meta.note: DARE 正确形态;refactory 唯一信息源

nodes.name: context-checkpoint
nodes.description:
context-checkpoint [sop] · context-management
研究阶段中追加落盘。 把发现、模式、重要论文、技术细节追加写入当前 Phase 的 context 文件。Step 1 先 import context-init 确保文件存在(幂等),并调用 timestamp.py 更新 Last Updated 时间戳。

nodes.name: context-init
nodes.description:
context-init [sop] · context-management
Phase 开始时创建 context 文件。 每个研究 Phase 开始调用一次,初始化后续 context-checkpoint 追加写入的文件。调用 timestamp.py 取当前时间,生成文件名 context/<timestamp>-<slug>.md。

nodes.name: timestamp.py
nodes.description:
timestamp.py [references] · context-management
scripts/ 下的小型时间戳辅助脚本,返回当前时间。供 context-init 命名文件、context-checkpoint 更新时间戳调用。

nodes.name: literature-overview
nodes.description:
literature-overview [sop] · literature-engine
最浅一档:landscape 扫描定位。 用 alphaxiv.discover_papers + ss.relevanceSearch 快速扫一个主题上有哪些论文、谁是关键作者、引用量大致多少。只读摘要和元数据,不读全文。 作用是 orientation —— 在投入深读之前先拿到鸟瞰图,判断哪些论文值得往下挖。HARD-GATE:禁止基于摘要对方法 / 结果 / 贡献下任何结论。

nodes.name: literature-search
nodes.description:
literature-search [sop] · literature-engine
中等深度:读 AI 摘要报告。 用 alphaxiv.get_paper_content(fullText: false)读每篇选中论文的结构化 AI 摘要报告,理解方法、贡献、发现以及彼此如何比较。适合做 literature survey、gap 分析、背景知识构建。HARD-GATE:每篇待分析论文都必须真正拉取摘要报告;但仍不是原始全文。

nodes.name: literature-research
nodes.description:
literature-research [sop] · literature-engine
最深一档:读原始全文。 用 alphaxiv.get_paper_content(fullText: true)+ answer_pdf_queries 读论文原文,做精确方法细节(方程 / 算法 / 架构)、实验设置(超参 / 数据集 / baseline)、技术级比较、实验设计、精确引用。这是深度天花板 —— AI 摘要在这一档不可接受,必须读原文。

nodes.name: spawn-agent
nodes.description:
spawn-agent [sop] · subagent-spawning
派生隔离的 subagent 执行任务并回收结构化输出。 DARE 体系里被依赖最广(blast-radius 最高)的基础设施 SOP —— 任何需要嵌套子代理编排的 skill 都依赖它。

nodes.name: web-search
nodes.description:
web-search [sop] · web-browsing
快速定向搜索。 理解一个主题上存在哪些页面和来源,适合快速事实核查、landscape 概览、为深入研究发现 URL。只返回片段(snippets),不读整页。需要全文内容分析时升级到 web-research。

nodes.name: web-research
nodes.description:
web-research [sop] · web-browsing
深度网页研究。 Step 1 用配置的 web-search MCP 发现 URL,Step 3 用 apify/rag-web-browser 抓取整页内容做分析。读完整页面而非片段,用于需要实际页面内容的研究。

nodes.name: convergence-multi-criteria-scoring
nodes.description:
convergence-multi-criteria-scoring [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:多准则加权打分。 AHP/BWM/TOPSIS/VIKOR/ELECTRE/PROMETHEE/MAUT。orchestrates 5 strategies(best-option-selection/full-ranking/category-sorting/non-compensatory-screening/weight-elicitation)→3 tactics→10 SOPs。输出 RankedList[]。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 multi-criteria-scoring → convergence-multi-criteria-scoring(裸名 multi-criteria-scoring 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: pairwise-ranking
nodes.description:
pairwise-ranking [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:成对比较出全局排名。 Bradley-Terry/Elo/TrueSkill/Condorcet/Borda/Schulze。orchestrates 5 strategies(deliberative-calibration/efficient-exploration/collective-adjudication/dynamic-tracking/coherence-diagnosis)。输出带 ratings+收敛+一致性的 RankedList[]。

nodes.name: structured-consensus
nodes.description:
structured-consensus [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:多视角收敛成共识。 Delphi 变体/NGT/RAND-UCLA/共识会议。orchestrates 5 strategies(convergence-distillation/disagreement-cartography/futures-calibration/appropriateness-bounding/argument-crystallization)。输出 ConsensusReport。

nodes.name: feasibility-assessment
nodes.description:
feasibility-assessment [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:可行性/就绪度评估。 TRL/NASSS/Stage-Gate/TRIZ/TOC/参数估计。orchestrates 5 strategies(maturity-diagnosis/constraint-identification/resource-envelope-estimation/comparative-feasibility-ranking/maturation-pathway-design)。输出 FeasibilityMatrix。

nodes.name: convergence-portfolio-optimization
nodes.description:
convergence-portfolio-optimization [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:组合优化选子集。 Markowitz/Knapsack/Pareto/Real-Options/MAP-Elites/minimax-regret。orchestrates 5 strategies(value-maximization/diversity-maximization/risk-balancing/temporal-sequencing/robustness-under-uncertainty)。输出 Portfolio。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 portfolio-optimization → convergence-portfolio-optimization(裸名 portfolio-optimization 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: steel-manning
nodes.description:
steel-manning [campaign] · convergence
Campaign:对抗式验证(pre-convergence QA)。 Devil's Advocacy/Pre-mortem/Red-Teaming/Dialectical Inquiry。orchestrates 5 strategies(resurrection-advocacy/winner-stress-testing/criteria-interrogation/stakeholder-objection-simulation/counter-thesis-construction)。输出 SteelManVerdict(ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE);SOPs 与 validation 共享。

nodes.name: best-option-selection
nodes.description:
best-option-selection [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段,凭 used-by:campaign + 罗列 tactics/SOPs 判定为 strategy)。 从候选里选单个最佳,WSM/TOPSIS/AHP/MAUT/VIKOR;允许补偿性权衡。orchestrates scoring-matrix-construction tactic + scoring-synthesis SOP。

nodes.name: full-ranking
nodes.description:
full-ranking [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 产出完整优先级排名(league table),PROMETHEE I/II/ELECTRE III/MAVT。orchestrates scoring-matrix-construction + multi-method-triangulation tactics + scoring-synthesis。

nodes.name: category-sorting
nodes.description:
category-sorting [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 把候选分类进预定义类别(A/B/C、合规/不合规),ELECTRE-Tri/FlowSort/AHPSort/DRSA。orchestrates scoring-matrix-construction + screening-then-scoring tactics。

nodes.name: non-compensatory-screening
nodes.description:
non-compensatory-screening [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段,Budget=S)。 非补偿淘汰:任一关键准则不达标即出局,无补偿。conjunctive/dominance/lexicographic/veto。orchestrates screening-then-scoring tactic + 直接 import 4 SOPs。

nodes.name: weight-elicitation
nodes.description:
weight-elicitation [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段,Budget=S)。 确定准则权重,AHP/Swing/BWM/MACBETH/Simos;≥2 方法对比。orchestrates multi-method-triangulation tactic + method-sensitivity-report SOP。

nodes.name: deliberative-calibration
nodes.description:
deliberative-calibration [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 小 N(≤15)完全成对比较,Bradley-Terry/Thurstone/AHP/Borda;高精度校准。orchestrates adaptive-pair-selection + consistency-audit-loop tactics。

nodes.name: efficient-exploration
nodes.description:
efficient-exploration [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 大 N(≥100)稀疏成对比较,TrueSkill/主动学习/Rank-Centrality;top-k 足够。orchestrates adaptive-pair-selection + consistency-audit-loop tactics。

nodes.name: collective-adjudication
nodes.description:
collective-adjudication [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 多评委排名聚合,Condorcet/Schulze/Borda/Kemeny-Young/Copeland;检测分歧与投票悖论。orchestrates multi-judge-aggregation + consistency-audit-loop tactics。

nodes.name: dynamic-tracking
nodes.description:
dynamic-tracking [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 连续/在线评分更新,Elo/Glicko-2/TrueSkill2/WHR;A/B 测试、候选随时间进出。orchestrates adaptive-pair-selection + consistency-audit-loop tactics。

nodes.name: coherence-diagnosis
nodes.description:
coherence-diagnosis [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 偏好一致性审计(CR/cycle 枚举/mElo);定稿前质量门。orchestrates consistency-audit-loop tactic + 直接 import 多个 SOP。

nodes.name: convergence-distillation
nodes.description:
convergence-distillation [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 迭代收敛到单一答案,Classic/Modified Delphi/NGT;匿名反馈轮直到阈值/稳定。orchestrates iterative-convergence-round tactic + consensus-synthesis。

nodes.name: disagreement-cartography
nodes.description:
disagreement-cartography [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 映射分歧结构而非强行收敛(wicked problems),Policy/Argument Delphi/SAST。orchestrates disagreement-mapping tactic。

nodes.name: futures-calibration
nodes.description:
futures-calibration [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 聚合概率预测,Real-Time Delphi/预测市场;技术时间线/市场预测。orchestrates iterative-convergence-round + threshold-calibration tactics。

nodes.name: appropriateness-bounding
nodes.description:
appropriateness-bounding [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 确立可接受性标准,RAND/UCLA Appropriateness/共识会议;rate-discuss-rerate。orchestrates iterative-convergence-round + threshold-calibration tactics。

nodes.name: argument-crystallization
nodes.description:
argument-crystallization [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 提炼各立场最强论证而非求同,Argument/Dialectical Delphi;每个论证须 steel-man。orchestrates disagreement-mapping + iterative-convergence-round tactics。

nodes.name: maturity-diagnosis
nodes.description:
maturity-diagnosis [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 评估候选当前就绪度,TRL 9 级/NASSS 7 维/IRL;产出多维就绪画像。orchestrates multi-dimensional-readiness-scan tactic。

nodes.name: constraint-identification
nodes.description:
constraint-identification [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 找阻塞/showstopper,TOC/TRIZ 矛盾分析/Pre-mortem;含严重度+可移除性。orchestrates constraint-drilling tactic。

nodes.name: resource-envelope-estimation
nodes.description:
resource-envelope-estimation [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 估算资源/预算/工期,参数法/类比法/三点 PERT;±30%→±10%。orchestrates multi-dimensional-readiness-scan + staged-gate-evaluation tactics。

nodes.name: comparative-feasibility-ranking
nodes.description:
comparative-feasibility-ranking [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 跨候选比较可行性,多维雷达 + 加权可行性指数。orchestrates multi-dimensional-readiness-scan + staged-gate-evaluation tactics + radar/feasibility-synthesis。

nodes.name: maturation-pathway-design
nodes.description:
maturation-pathway-design [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 设计走向就绪的路线图,Stage-Gate/技术路线图/里程碑规划。orchestrates staged-gate-evaluation + multi-dimensional-readiness-scan tactics。

nodes.name: value-maximization
nodes.description:
value-maximization [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 约束内最大化总价值(ROI/影响),Knapsack/LP/成本效益/NPV。orchestrates pareto-frontier-construction tactic + 直接 import 4 SOPs。

nodes.name: diversity-maximization
nodes.description:
diversity-maximization [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 最大化覆盖/多样性,MAP-Elites/niche 覆盖/最大离散。orchestrates niche-coverage-analysis + pareto-frontier-construction tactics。

nodes.name: risk-balancing
nodes.description:
risk-balancing [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 平衡风险-收益,Markowitz 均值方差/CVaR/风险平价/Kelly。orchestrates pareto-frontier-construction + scenario-stress-testing tactics。

nodes.name: temporal-sequencing
nodes.description:
temporal-sequencing [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 排序/分期/依赖,Real Options/关键路径/依赖图/分阶段投资。orchestrates pareto-frontier-construction + scenario-stress-testing tactics。

nodes.name: robustness-under-uncertainty
nodes.description:
robustness-under-uncertainty [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 跨多情景稳健,Minimax regret/鲁棒优化/情景规划/Info-gap。orchestrates scenario-stress-testing + pareto-frontier-construction tactics。

nodes.name: resurrection-advocacy
nodes.description:
resurrection-advocacy [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 为被淘汰候选辩护,Devil's Advocacy/辩证质询/对抗协作;验证淘汰是否正当。orchestrates adversarial-debate-protocol + multi-perspective-attack tactics。

nodes.name: winner-stress-testing
nodes.description:
winner-stress-testing [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 压力测试获胜者,Pre-mortem/Red-Teaming/失效模式分析。orchestrates assumption-excavation + adversarial-debate-protocol + multi-perspective-attack tactics。

nodes.name: criteria-interrogation
nodes.description:
criteria-interrogation [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 质询评价准则本身,Assumption-based Planning/CSH/边界批判。orchestrates assumption-excavation + multi-perspective-attack tactics。

nodes.name: stakeholder-objection-simulation
nodes.description:
stakeholder-objection-simulation [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 模拟利益相关者异议+政治可行性;role-play。orchestrates multi-perspective-attack + adversarial-debate-protocol tactics。

nodes.name: counter-thesis-construction
nodes.description:
counter-thesis-construction [strategy] · convergence
Strategy(inferred:无 layer 字段)。 构造最强反论题,辩证质询/正-反-合;尝试 synthesis。orchestrates adversarial-debate-protocol + assumption-excavation tactics。

nodes.name: convergence-scoring-matrix-construction
nodes.description:
convergence-scoring-matrix-construction [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 标准 MCDA 流水线:定准则→赋权→打分→归一→敏感性。sequences SOPs criterion-definition/weight-elicitation-sop/alternative-scoring/normalization/scoring-synthesis。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 scoring-matrix-construction → convergence-scoring-matrix-construction(裸名 scoring-matrix-construction 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: multi-method-triangulation
nodes.description:
multi-method-triangulation [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 同一候选用 2-3 种 MCDA 方法打分,比对排名一致性(Kendall τ),识别方法敏感项。sequences alternative-scoring/rank-comparison/method-sensitivity-report。

nodes.name: screening-then-scoring
nodes.description:
screening-then-scoring [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 先非补偿淘汰再细打分:threshold→conjunctive-filter→dominance-check→复用 scoring-matrix-construction 全套 SOP。

nodes.name: adaptive-pair-selection
nodes.description:
adaptive-pair-selection [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 循环:按信息增益选对→比较→更新评分→查收敛,直到稳定/预算耗尽。sequences pair-selector/comparison-executor/rating-update/convergence-check。

nodes.name: multi-judge-aggregation
nodes.description:
multi-judge-aggregation [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 收集多评委独立 ballot→社会选择聚合→Condorcet cycle 审计。sequences ballot-collection/aggregation-method/cycle-detection。

nodes.name: consistency-audit-loop
nodes.description:
consistency-audit-loop [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 循环:检测 cycle→定位不一致→重比问题对,直到 CR 达标。sequences cycle-detection/inconsistency-localization/comparison-executor。

nodes.name: iterative-convergence-round
nodes.description:
iterative-convergence-round [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 一个完整 Delphi 轮:收集判断→匿名反馈→测共识→决定续/停。sequences judgment-collection/feedback-distribution/consensus-measurement/round-decision。

nodes.name: disagreement-mapping
nodes.description:
disagreement-mapping [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 收集→聚类→提取各簇论证→可视化断层线。sequences judgment-collection/cluster-analysis/argument-extraction/disagreement-visualization。

nodes.name: threshold-calibration
nodes.description:
threshold-calibration [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 扫描共识阈值看哪些项稳健 vs 脆弱,产出阈值-共识曲线。sequences threshold-sweep/consensus-classification/consensus-measurement。

nodes.name: multi-dimensional-readiness-scan
nodes.description:
multi-dimensional-readiness-scan [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 逐维评分(可并行)→合成雷达→识别瓶颈维。sequences dimension-assessment/radar-synthesis/bottleneck-identification。

nodes.name: constraint-drilling
nodes.description:
constraint-drilling [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 识别约束→分类(硬/软/假设)→评可移除性→设计移除路径。sequences constraint-identification-sop/constraint-classification/removability-assessment/removal-path。

nodes.name: staged-gate-evaluation
nodes.description:
staged-gate-evaluation [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 定义 gate 准则→逐 gate 评判→GO/KILL/RECYCLE 裁决。sequences gate-criteria-definition/gate-judgment/feasibility-synthesis。

nodes.name: pareto-frontier-construction
nodes.description:
pareto-frontier-construction [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 多目标优化建 Pareto 前沿→可视化权衡→从非支配解选组合。sequences objective-definition/optimization-run/pareto-visualization/selection-from-frontier。

nodes.name: niche-coverage-analysis
nodes.description:
niche-coverage-analysis [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 定义 niche→映射候选→评覆盖与缺口。sequences niche-definition/niche-mapping/coverage-scoring。

nodes.name: scenario-stress-testing
nodes.description:
scenario-stress-testing [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 构造≥3 情景→逐情景评组合→合成稳健性裁决。sequences scenario-construction/portfolio-evaluation-per-scenario/portfolio-synthesis。

nodes.name: adversarial-debate-protocol
nodes.description:
adversarial-debate-protocol [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 三角色正式辩论:advocate 建案→critic 攻击→judge 裁决,REVISE 则迭代(≥2 轮,≤4 轮升级到 strategy)。sequences advocate-construction/critic-attack/judge-verdict。

nodes.name: assumption-excavation
nodes.description:
assumption-excavation [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 三阶段:提取假设(≥5)→对抗式挑战→结论敏感性(找承重假设)。sequences assumption-extraction/assumption-challenge/conclusion-sensitivity。

nodes.name: multi-perspective-attack
nodes.description:
multi-perspective-attack [tactic] · convergence
Tactic(execution: tactic)。 分派≥3 个不同视角独立攻击决策→synthesize 成统一裁决。sequences perspective-assignment/perspective-attack/steel-manning-synthesis。

nodes.name: criterion-definition
nodes.description:
criterion-definition [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从研究目标+候选提取评价准则。HARD-GATE:3-12 条,每条含名称/定义/单位/方向。

nodes.name: weight-elicitation-sop
nodes.description:
weight-elicitation-sop [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 用指定方法(AHP/Swing/BWM/MACBETH/Simos)算权重向量。HARD-GATE:权重和=1.0±0.001 且过一致性检验。

nodes.name: alternative-scoring
nodes.description:
alternative-scoring [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 候选×准则逐格打分成评分矩阵。HARD-GATE:无空值,每格附 1 句理由,定量准则用实数据。

nodes.name: normalization
nodes.description:
normalization [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 归一化评分矩阵使跨准则可比。HARD-GATE:所有值落 [0,1],方向已处理。

nodes.name: dominance-check
nodes.description:
dominance-check [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 Pareto 支配检查,找被支配/非支配候选。HARD-GATE:每个'被支配'判定须指明支配者并验严格定义。

nodes.name: threshold-setting
nodes.description:
threshold-setting [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 为每个准则定最低可接受阈值(供非补偿筛选)。HARD-GATE:每阈值含理由且落在该准则实际取值域。

nodes.name: conjunctive-filter
nodes.description:
conjunctive-filter [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 合取规则筛选:任一阈值不达标即淘汰。HARD-GATE:每个淘汰须列违反准则/实际值/阈值。

nodes.name: rank-comparison
nodes.description:
rank-comparison [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 比对多个排名结果算一致性(Kendall τ/Spearman ρ),列差异项。HARD-GATE:至少报一个秩相关指标且列出≥2 位差异的候选。

nodes.name: method-sensitivity-report
nodes.description:
method-sensitivity-report [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 分析 MCDA 方法选择对排名的影响,区分方法无关/方法依赖结论。HARD-GATE:须明确二者并对方法依赖结论给建议。

nodes.name: scoring-synthesis
nodes.description:
scoring-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 综合评分矩阵+排名+敏感性出最终推荐。HARD-GATE:须含明确推荐项/置信度/关键假设/风险提示,禁无结论。

nodes.name: pair-selector
nodes.description:
pair-selector [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 按信息增益选下一组比较对。HARD-GATE:至少一对,每对引用 current_ratings 中存在的两个不同候选。

nodes.name: comparison-executor
nodes.description:
comparison-executor [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 执行单次成对比较,出 winner/confidence/reasoning。HARD-GATE:恰一胜者,confidence∈[0.5,1.0],理由引用双方具体属性。

nodes.name: rating-update
nodes.description:
rating-update [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 将新判断并入评分模型(BT-MLE/Elo/TrueSkill)。HARD-GATE:返回全部候选的更新评分,胜者评分不降,method 与输入一致。

nodes.name: convergence-check
nodes.description:
convergence-check [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 分析评分历史判断排名是否稳定。HARD-GATE:含 boolean converged + stability_score∈[0,1];未收敛须给 recommendation。

nodes.name: ballot-collection
nodes.description:
ballot-collection [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 多评委独立出排名 ballot(互不可见)。HARD-GATE:每视角一票且各票完整排名,除非视角真无法区分否则不得雷同。

nodes.name: aggregation-method
nodes.description:
aggregation-method [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 社会选择法(Schulze/Borda/Kemeny-Young/Copeland/Condorcet)聚合 ballot 成共识排名。HARD-GATE:完整排名,Condorcet 胜者(若有)须列首。

nodes.name: cycle-detection
nodes.description:
cycle-detection [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 扫成对矩阵找偏好环(A>B>C>A)并算 transitivity。HARD-GATE:cycles 数组(无则空)+ transitivity_score∈[0,1],所报环须可对输入验证。

nodes.name: inconsistency-localization
nodes.description:
inconsistency-localization [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 给定 cycle,定位最可能出错的成对判断并按问题度排序。HARD-GATE:cycles 非空时至少一对,每对须出现在输入环中。

nodes.name: ranking-synthesis
nodes.description:
ranking-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从收敛评分+一致性报告产出最终排名工件。HARD-GATE:须排全部候选+含置信区间+引用一致性状态,不得遗漏候选。

nodes.name: judgment-collection
nodes.description:
judgment-collection [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 各视角对焦点问题独立给判断(互不可见)。HARD-GATE:每视角一个 judgment 对象,含 perspective_id/response/reasoning。

nodes.name: feedback-distribution
nodes.description:
feedback-distribution [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 生成匿名反馈报告汇总本轮判断分布。HARD-GATE:含统计摘要+匿名理由主题+轮次号,禁任何视角归属。

nodes.name: consensus-measurement
nodes.description:
consensus-measurement [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 按数据类型自动选法(IQR/百分比/Kendall W)算共识分。HARD-GATE:含 consensus_score/method_used/threshold_met/interpretation,须实算非估。

nodes.name: round-decision
nodes.description:
round-decision [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 据共识分/轮次/稳定性决定续轮或停。HARD-GATE:decision 恰为 continue/stop 之一,含 reason 与 next_action。

nodes.name: cluster-analysis
nodes.description:
cluster-analysis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从判断中识别自然意见簇并刻画各簇。HARD-GATE:有真分歧时≥2 簇,每簇含 cluster_id/position_summary/member_count/characterization。

nodes.name: argument-extraction
nodes.description:
argument-extraction [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 提取并 steel-man 某簇的核心论证。HARD-GATE:每簇≥1 论证,各含 claim/evidence/reasoning/strength 且为最强版本。

nodes.name: disagreement-visualization
nodes.description:
disagreement-visualization [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 产出分歧拓扑图(簇/论证/断层线/类型)。HARD-GATE:disagreement_map 覆盖所有输入簇,多簇时≥1 断层线。

nodes.name: threshold-sweep
nodes.description:
threshold-sweep [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 在阈值范围内逐级算共识状态,产出阈值-共识曲线。HARD-GATE:threshold_curve ≥5 数据点且覆盖全输入范围。

nodes.name: consensus-classification
nodes.description:
consensus-classification [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 在给定阈值把各项分为共识/非共识。HARD-GATE:consensus_items[]+dissensus_items[],每输入项恰属一类并附分数与理由。

nodes.name: consensus-synthesis
nodes.description:
consensus-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 综合全部轮次出最终共识报告。HARD-GATE:consensus_report 含 agreements/dissent_record/process_summary/confidence_assessment,所有项须有交代。

nodes.name: dimension-assessment
nodes.description:
dimension-assessment [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 为候选打单个就绪维度分(1-9,TRL 式),附证据+缺口;可并行。HARD-GATE:数值分+≥2 证据+≥1 缺口。

nodes.name: radar-synthesis
nodes.description:
radar-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 合并各维度分成雷达数据+总就绪度+叙述。HARD-GATE:radar_chart_data 含所有维度+overall_readiness+叙述,不漏输入维度。

nodes.name: convergence-bottleneck-identification
nodes.description:
convergence-bottleneck-identification [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从雷达数据识别瓶颈维并按严重度排序。HARD-GATE:≥1 瓶颈+严重度排序+优先建议(高就绪也有相对瓶颈)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 bottleneck-identification → convergence-bottleneck-identification(裸名 bottleneck-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: constraint-identification-sop
nodes.description:
constraint-identification-sop [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 用 TOC/TRIZ/Pre-mortem 发现候选的约束。HARD-GATE:≥3 约束+方法归属+初始严重度估计。

nodes.name: constraint-classification
nodes.description:
constraint-classification [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 把约束分为硬约束/软约束/假设。HARD-GATE:所有输入约束均分类,三类各≥1,每条附理由,不漏项。

nodes.name: removability-assessment
nodes.description:
removability-assessment [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 评单个约束可移除性(0-1)+工时估计+依赖。HARD-GATE:含可移除分+工时+≥1 依赖,无理由的分数被拒。

nodes.name: removal-path
nodes.description:
removal-path [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 为约束设计具体移除路径(分步+工期+资源+成功标准)。HARD-GATE:≥3 有序步骤,各含工期/资源/成功标准,模糊则拒。

nodes.name: gate-criteria-definition
nodes.description:
gate-criteria-definition [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 为某 stage gate 定义可量化通过准则+证据要求(独立于候选以防偏)。HARD-GATE:≥3 准则,各含可测阈值+证据要求,模糊则拒。

nodes.name: gate-judgment
nodes.description:
gate-judgment [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 据 gate 准则评判候选出 GO/KILL/RECYCLE+证据。HARD-GATE:含裁决+逐准则证据评估+晋级条件,无准则级支撑则拒。

nodes.name: feasibility-synthesis
nodes.description:
feasibility-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 综合所有评估出可行性矩阵+推荐(proceed/defer/abandon)+风险摘要。HARD-GATE:含矩阵+明确推荐+top3 风险,推荐须有矩阵支撑。

nodes.name: objective-definition
nodes.description:
objective-definition [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 把上下文+候选翻译成形式化优化目标/约束/权衡偏好。HARD-GATE:≥2 个不同目标+≥1 约束,不足则 flag 请求澄清。

nodes.name: optimization-run
nodes.description:
optimization-run [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 多目标优化产出非支配解 Pareto 前沿。HARD-GATE:≥5 个非支配解;候选太少/约束太紧则报最大可达前沿并说明。

nodes.name: pareto-visualization
nodes.description:
pareto-visualization [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 把 Pareto 前沿转成可视化数据+权衡叙述。HARD-GATE:含结构化可视化数据+叙述,叙述须引用前沿具体点并说明移动得失。

nodes.name: selection-from-frontier
nodes.description:
selection-from-frontier [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 据偏好从 Pareto 前沿选最终组合。HARD-GATE:含所选组合+引用前沿位置的理由+≥1 个备选及其得失。

nodes.name: niche-definition
nodes.description:
niche-definition [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 定义组合应覆盖的 niche/能力区。HARD-GATE:4-10 个互斥且集体覆盖的 niche,各含描述+重要度。

nodes.name: niche-mapping
nodes.description:
niche-mapping [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 把每个候选映射到所覆盖 niche+覆盖强度。HARD-GATE:完整覆盖图(每候选×每 niche)+无强候选的缺口识别。

nodes.name: coverage-scoring
nodes.description:
coverage-scoring [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从覆盖图算覆盖完整度/冗余/缺口严重度。HARD-GATE:覆盖分(0-1)+冗余分(0-1)+严重度排序缺口表,均附方法论。

nodes.name: scenario-construction
nodes.description:
scenario-construction [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 构造跨关键不确定性的≥3 个独立情景。HARD-GATE:≥3 个不同情景,各含叙述+关键假设+概率估计。

nodes.name: portfolio-evaluation-per-scenario
nodes.description:
portfolio-evaluation-per-scenario [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 评估某组合在某情景下的表现与脆弱性。HARD-GATE:含量化绩效指标+情景下变脆弱/失效的成员识别。

nodes.name: portfolio-synthesis
nodes.description:
portfolio-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 综合所有情景评估出最终组合推荐+稳健性分。HARD-GATE:含最终推荐+稳健性分(0-1)+可操作建议,须引用所有已评情景。

nodes.name: advocate-construction
nodes.description:
advocate-construction [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;与 validation 共享)。 为被拒候选/反论题构造最强辩护(advocate 角色,隔离)。HARD-GATE:含论题陈述+≥3 论证+至少 1 处弱点重构为优势+承认真实弱点(steel-man)。

nodes.name: critic-attack
nodes.description:
critic-attack [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;与 validation 共享)。 从多角度攻击 advocate 的案子(critic 角色)。HARD-GATE:≥3 攻击+各 HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW 严重度+证据,至少 1 击针对最强点。

nodes.name: judge-verdict
nodes.description:
judge-verdict [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;与 validation 共享)。 权衡 advocate vs critic 出 ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE(judge 角色,隔离保中立)。HARD-GATE:逐条回应每个攻击+案子强度评估+条件+推理链。

nodes.name: convergence-assumption-extraction
nodes.description:
convergence-assumption-extraction [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 系统性挖出决策下的隐含假设+置信度。HARD-GATE:≥5 个不同假设,各含置信度(H/M/L)+类别+理由。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-extraction → convergence-assumption-extraction(裸名 assumption-extraction 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: convergence-assumption-challenge
nodes.description:
convergence-assumption-challenge [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 对单个假设构造最强反驳+替代假设+若错的影响。HARD-GATE:含挑战论证+≥1 替代假设+影响评估+挑战本身的置信度。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-challenge → convergence-assumption-challenge(裸名 assumption-challenge 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: conclusion-sensitivity
nodes.description:
conclusion-sensitivity [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 映射哪些假设承重(若失则结论变)vs 装饰性。HARD-GATE:每个假设敏感度评级+关键假设识别+交互效应+整体稳健性评级。

nodes.name: perspective-assignment
nodes.description:
perspective-assignment [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 定义≥3 个真正不同的攻击视角(价值/关切/成功标准/可能异议)。HARD-GATE:≥3 视角,价值不重叠,各含具体关切+'失败'定义。

nodes.name: perspective-attack
nodes.description:
perspective-attack [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 从指定视角(完全代入)攻击决策+建设性替代。HARD-GATE:≥2 个植根该视角的攻击+严重度+≥1 建设性替代,须与视角一致非通用。

nodes.name: steel-manning-synthesis
nodes.description:
steel-manning-synthesis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent)。 综合所有攻击+裁决出 campaign 最终统一裁决。HARD-GATE:ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE+每攻击均被回应+存留关切及严重度+修改建议+置信度。

nodes.name: convergence-sensitivity-analysis
nodes.description:
convergence-sensitivity-analysis [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;经 subagent-spawning/spawn-agent 派生;跨 scoring/portfolio/steel-manning 共享)。 扰动参数测结论稳健性。HARD-GATE:须扰动≥3 参数,单参数不足以宣称稳健。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 sensitivity-analysis → convergence-sensitivity-analysis(裸名 sensitivity-analysis 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: convergence-saturation-detection
nodes.description:
convergence-saturation-detection [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;经 subagent-spawning/spawn-agent 派生;6 campaign 全共享)。 判断迭代是否到边际递减该停。HARD-GATE:≥3 数据点方可宣称饱和。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 saturation-detection → convergence-saturation-detection(裸名 saturation-detection 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: convergence-multi-stakeholder-simulation
nodes.description:
convergence-multi-stakeholder-simulation [sop] · convergence
SOP(execution: subagent;经 subagent-spawning/spawn-agent 派生;steel-manning+consensus 共享)。 模拟多利益相关者视角的异议/支持论证。HARD-GATE:须模拟≥3 个不同视角。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 multi-stakeholder-simulation → convergence-multi-stakeholder-simulation(裸名 multi-stakeholder-simulation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: convergence-web-search
nodes.description:
convergence-web-search [sop] · convergence
Import SOP(execution: import,source: web-browsing/web-search)。 快速 web 扫描发现相关页面(方法论参考/案例/最佳实践)。本地仅 stub,执行委托给 web-browsing 包(dangling cross-repo)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-search → convergence-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: convergence-web-research
nodes.description:
convergence-web-research [sop] · convergence
Import SOP(execution: import,source: web-browsing/web-research)。 深度 web 研究+整页抽取(方法论指南/教程/实现参考)。委托给 web-browsing 包(dangling cross-repo)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-research → convergence-web-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-research)。

nodes.name: convergence-paper-overview
nodes.description:
convergence-paper-overview [sop] · convergence
Import SOP(execution: import,source: literature-engine/paper-overview)。 摘要级论文 landscape 扫描(MCDA/投票理论/Delphi/优化方法论)。委托给 literature-engine 包(dangling cross-repo)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-overview → convergence-paper-overview;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: convergence-paper-search
nodes.description:
convergence-paper-search [sop] · convergence
Import SOP(execution: import,source: literature-engine/paper-search)。 读论文 AI 摘要报告(中等深度)。委托给 literature-engine 包(dangling cross-repo)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-search → convergence-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-search)。

nodes.name: convergence-paper-research
nodes.description:
convergence-paper-research [sop] · convergence
Import SOP(execution: import,source: literature-engine/paper-research)。 论文全文深读(算法/证明/实现细节)。委托给 literature-engine 包(dangling cross-repo)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-research → convergence-paper-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-research)。

nodes.name: creative-ideation
nodes.description:
creative-ideation [campaign] · creative-ideation
[入口 entry · campaign] Creative Generation Engine —— transforms research hypotheses into diverse solution spaces via 10 parallel creativity campaigns spanning structural, analogical, destructive, and combinatorial methods. 编排:10 campaign(10 子战役 + 5 import SOP)。ENTRY.md 有 Campaign Routing 关键词表 + 4 簇 Multi-Campaign Orchestration(类比族/组合族/颠覆族/覆盖族)。引擎止于 idea generation,不收敛/不验证/不实现。

nodes.name: ablation-brainstorm
nodes.description:
ablation-brainstorm [strategy] · creative-ideation
[策略 strategy] Remove components one by one, observe system changes to reveal hidden dependencies and generate ideas from structural gaps. 编排:1 tactic, 3 sop。

nodes.name: ablation-execution
nodes.description:
ablation-execution [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Remove components one by one from a system, record the response/impact of each removal. subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: abstraction-extraction
nodes.description:
abstraction-extraction [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Extract abstract principles from concrete domain cases. Strips domain-specific details to reveal transferable mechanisms. subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: abstraction-ladder
nodes.description:
abstraction-ladder [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Perform bisociation at multiple abstraction levels subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: abstraction-to-design
nodes.description:
abstraction-to-design [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] "Abstract biological principle to design principle. Bridge from biology to engineering." subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: alternatives-generation
nodes.description:
alternatives-generation [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Generate alternatives for every known approach — ensure no approach goes unchallenged. subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: analogical-transfer
nodes.description:
analogical-transfer [strategy] · creative-ideation
[策略 strategy] Systematic structure-mapping from source to target domain (Gentner). Identify relational correspondences and transfer higher-order constraints. 编排:2 tactic, 5 sop。

nodes.name: analogy-chain
nodes.description:
analogy-chain [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Chain analogies to deeper levels (3-5 layers). Each layer reveals new aspects and insights not visible at the surface. subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: analogy-extraction
nodes.description:
analogy-extraction [tactic] · creative-ideation
[战术 tactic] Extract transferable structural principles from source domains. Orchestrates source identification → abstraction → structural mapping → transfer validation.

nodes.name: analogy-quality-assessment
nodes.description:
analogy-quality-assessment [sop] · creative-ideation
[SOP 叶子] Assess analogy depth (surface/structural/systemic). Determines whether an analogy warrants transfer investment. subagent 叶子,经 spawn-agent 派生,无下游 use 边。

nodes.name: anti-benchmark
nodes.description:
anti-benchmark [strategy] · creative-ideation
[策略 strategy] Challenge industry best practices' hidden assumptions. Deconstruct benchmarks to reveal unexamined constraints. 编排:1 tactic, 5 sop。

nodes.name: assumption-destruction
nodes.description:
assumption-destruction [campaign] · creative-ideation

nodes.description:
boundary-analysis [campaign] · deep-insight
Campaign:方法在哪里失效 —— 有效性边界。 validity envelope、robustness、failure mode、scaling limit。编排 5 strategy(validity-envelope-mapping / robustness-testing / boundary-critique / failure-mode-analysis / scaling-frontier)+ 3 tactic + 11 subagent SOP;boundary-synthesis 在 campaign 层收口。

nodes.name: deep-insight-sensitivity-analysis
nodes.description:
deep-insight-sensitivity-analysis [campaign] · deep-insight
Campaign:哪些假设/参数最关键。 按对结论的影响排序。编排 5 strategy(parameter-screening / variance-decomposition / assumption-criticality / uncertainty-propagation / decision-sensitivity)+ 3 tactic + 11 subagent SOP。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 sensitivity-analysis → deep-insight-sensitivity-analysis(裸名 sensitivity-analysis 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: problem-reformulation
nodes.description:
problem-reformulation [campaign] · deep-insight
Campaign:质疑问题本身 —— 是否在解错的问题。 逃逸主导观念、多视角重构、辩证探究、邪恶问题评估、欣赏式重构。编排 5 strategy(dominant-idea-escape / multi-perspective-reframing / dialectical-reformulation / wickedness-assessment / appreciative-reframing)+ 3 tactic + 10 subagent SOP。

nodes.name: deep-insight-gap-identification
nodes.description:
deep-insight-gap-identification [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:搜索空白、识别缺失。 landscape 扫描 + gap-indicating 句式抽取 + concept matrix + EGM。经 evidence-mapping tactic,或直接调 gap-keyword-extraction / concept-matrix-construction / egm-construction。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 gap-identification → deep-insight-gap-identification(裸名 gap-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: gap-classification
nodes.description:
gap-classification [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:分类 gap 类型。 Miles 7-type + AHRQ 4-reason。无 tactic,直接调 gap-typology-classification + ahrq-reason-classification。

nodes.name: gap-validation
nodes.description:
gap-validation [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:验证 gap 真实性。 跨库验证 + 时间稳定性 + 假 gap 过滤。经 cross-validation tactic。

nodes.name: deep-insight-gap-prioritization
nodes.description:
deep-insight-gap-prioritization [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:排序 gap 优先级。 importance×feasibility×novelty×urgency 多准则评分 + stakeholder 确认 + 敏感性。经 prioritization-scoring tactic,另直接调 evidence-grading + multi-stakeholder-simulation。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 gap-prioritization → deep-insight-gap-prioritization(裸名 gap-prioritization 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: gap-synthesis-strategy
nodes.description:
gap-synthesis-strategy [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:生成 gap 报告/研究议程。 无 tactic,直接调 gap-synthesis + egm-construction + (shared) evidence-synthesis 收口。

nodes.name: root-cause-drilling
nodes.description:
root-cause-drilling [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:为什么存在 —— 根因钻取。 5 Whys + 鱼骨 + 因果树。经 causal-tree-building tactic。

nodes.name: stakeholder-mapping
nodes.description:
stakeholder-mapping [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:谁受影响。 CSH 12 问 + JTBD + salience。经 boundary-unfolding tactic + (shared) multi-stakeholder-simulation。

nodes.name: tension-mining
nodes.description:
tension-mining [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:对立力量/张力/极性。 经 dialectical-synthesis tactic(evaporating-cloud + polarity-mapping)。

nodes.name: question-reformulation
nodes.description:
question-reformulation [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:如何框定问题。 HMW + 抽象阶梯 + 苏格拉底。无 tactic,直接调 abstraction-laddering + hmw-formulation + socratic-probing。

nodes.name: assumption-audit
nodes.description:
assumption-audit [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:隐含假设审计/红队。 经 assumption-stress-test tactic + (shared) assumption-surfacing。

nodes.name: deep-insight-validity-envelope-mapping
nodes.description:
deep-insight-validity-envelope-mapping [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:有效条件/适用范围。 多轴扰动测退化曲线,构造多维 validity envelope。经 systematic-perturbation tactic。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 validity-envelope-mapping → deep-insight-validity-envelope-mapping(裸名 validity-envelope-mapping 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: robustness-testing
nodes.description:
robustness-testing [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:跨方法一致性/Wimsatt 鲁棒性。 枚举假设→生成替代模型→比对收敛→标记 fragile。经 multi-model-convergence tactic。

nodes.name: boundary-critique
nodes.description:
boundary-critique [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:系统边界/纳入排除/CSH 批判。 无 tactic,直接调 csh-12-question(复用自 insight)+ (shared) assumption-surfacing。

nodes.name: failure-mode-analysis
nodes.description:
failure-mode-analysis [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:失效模式/边界输入/分布偏移。 经 failure-mode-cataloging tactic。

nodes.name: scaling-frontier
nodes.description:
scaling-frontier [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:规模极限/scaling law/行为突变。 无 tactic,直接调 scaling-regime-detection + edge-case-generation。

nodes.name: parameter-screening
nodes.description:
parameter-screening [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:快速筛选/Morris/OAT。 经 screening-then-decomposition tactic,本档主要触发 morris-screening。

nodes.name: variance-decomposition
nodes.description:
variance-decomposition [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:方差分解/Sobol 指数/交互效应。 经 screening-then-decomposition tactic 的 sobol-decomposition + interaction-detection 段。

nodes.name: assumption-criticality
nodes.description:
assumption-criticality [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:假设致命性 —— 扰动/否定/重推。 经 assumption-perturbation tactic。

nodes.name: uncertainty-propagation
nodes.description:
uncertainty-propagation [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:不确定性传播/Monte Carlo。 经 uncertainty-cascade tactic。

nodes.name: decision-sensitivity
nodes.description:
decision-sensitivity [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:决策敏感性/EVPI/龙卷风图。 无 tactic,直接调 critical-path-identification + sensitivity-synthesis 收口。

nodes.name: dominant-idea-escape
nodes.description:
dominant-idea-escape [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:主导观念/范式锁定/横向逃逸。 经 lateral-escape tactic。

nodes.name: multi-perspective-reframing
nodes.description:
multi-perspective-reframing [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:多视角/CATWOE/重构矩阵。 经 multi-worldview-comparison tactic + (shared) multi-stakeholder-simulation。

nodes.name: dialectical-reformulation
nodes.description:
dialectical-reformulation [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:双环学习/支配变量/辩证。 经 dialectical-escalation tactic。

nodes.name: wickedness-assessment
nodes.description:
wickedness-assessment [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:邪恶问题/Rittel 标准/Cynefin。 无 tactic,直接调 wickedness-scoring。

nodes.name: appreciative-reframing
nodes.description:
appreciative-reframing [strategy] · deep-insight
Strategy:正向偏差/欣赏式探询/优势视角。 无 tactic,直接调 appreciative-discovery + reformulation-synthesis 收口。

nodes.name: evidence-mapping
nodes.description:
evidence-mapping [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:系统化证据地图构建。 序列 concept-matrix-construction + gap-keyword-extraction + evidence-grading + egm-construction;入料 paper-overview/paper-search。

nodes.name: cross-validation
nodes.description:
cross-validation [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:多源 gap 真实性验证。 cross-database-verification + temporal-sensitivity-testing + false-gap-filtering + stakeholder-confirmation;入料 web-search/paper-search。

nodes.name: prioritization-scoring
nodes.description:
prioritization-scoring [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:多维 gap 评分排序。 multi-criteria-scoring + stakeholder-confirmation + (shared) evidence-synthesis;入料 web-research。

nodes.name: causal-tree-building
nodes.description:
causal-tree-building [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:逻辑因果树构建。 five-whys-drilling + ishikawa-decomposition + current-reality-tree + clr-validation;入料 paper-search。

nodes.name: boundary-unfolding
nodes.description:
boundary-unfolding [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:展开隐藏系统边界。 csh-12-question + jtbd-mapping + salience-classification + (shared) multi-stakeholder-simulation。

nodes.name: dialectical-synthesis
nodes.description:
dialectical-synthesis [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:正-反-合循环。 evaporating-cloud + polarity-mapping;入料 paper-search/web-research。

nodes.name: assumption-stress-test
nodes.description:
assumption-stress-test [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:系统化假设压力测试。 先 (shared) assumption-surfacing 浮现,再 abp-vulnerability-classification 分象限 + clr-validation;入料 paper-research。

nodes.name: multi-model-convergence
nodes.description:
multi-model-convergence [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:Wimsatt 式跨模型交叉验证。 assumption-enumeration → alternative-model-generation → convergence-assessment → fragility-flagging;入料 paper-research。

nodes.name: systematic-perturbation
nodes.description:
systematic-perturbation [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:多轴有效性探测。 variation-axis-definition → controlled-perturbation → validity-envelope-construction;入料 paper-search。

nodes.name: deep-insight-failure-mode-cataloging
nodes.description:
deep-insight-failure-mode-cataloging [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:系统化失效分类。 edge-case-generation → failure-clustering → scaling-regime-detection;入料 web-search。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 failure-mode-cataloging → deep-insight-failure-mode-cataloging(裸名 failure-mode-cataloging 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: screening-then-decomposition
nodes.description:
screening-then-decomposition [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:Morris 快筛 → Sobol 精分。 morris-screening → sobol-decomposition → interaction-detection;入料 paper-search。被 parameter-screening 与 variance-decomposition 共用。

nodes.name: deep-insight-assumption-perturbation
nodes.description:
deep-insight-assumption-perturbation [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:逐一假设否定与重推。 assumption-extraction → negation-definition → re-derivation → conclusion-sensitivity-measurement + (shared) assumption-surfacing;入料 paper-research。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-perturbation → deep-insight-assumption-perturbation(裸名 assumption-perturbation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: uncertainty-cascade
nodes.description:
uncertainty-cascade [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:Monte Carlo 经模型传播。 distribution-assignment → monte-carlo-sampling → critical-path-identification;入料 paper-search。

nodes.name: lateral-escape
nodes.description:
lateral-escape [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:横向逃逸主导观念。 dominant-idea-identification → provocation-generation → consequence-following;入料 web-research。

nodes.name: multi-worldview-comparison
nodes.description:
multi-worldview-comparison [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:多世界观比较。 catwoe-analysis + reframing-matrix + appreciative-discovery + (shared) multi-stakeholder-simulation。

nodes.name: deep-insight-dialectical-escalation
nodes.description:
deep-insight-dialectical-escalation [tactic] · deep-insight
Tactic:单环→双环学习升级。 governing-variable-surfacing → counter-assumption-generation → wickedness-scoring + (shared) assumption-surfacing。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 dialectical-escalation → deep-insight-dialectical-escalation(裸名 dialectical-escalation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-web-search
nodes.description:
deep-insight-web-search [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(import,来自 web-browsing): 快速 web 扫描定位 landscape。Snippets only —— 不可基于摘要片段下结论,只作深挖线索。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-search → deep-insight-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-web-research
nodes.description:
deep-insight-web-research [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(import,来自 web-browsing): Apify 全页抓取的深度 web 研究。必须 fetch 全页 —— 不可基于预览下结论。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-research → deep-insight-web-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-research)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-paper-overview
nodes.description:
deep-insight-paper-overview [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(import,来自 literature-engine/literature-overview): 论文元数据+摘要级鸟瞰。Abstracts only —— 未深读前不下实质结论。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-overview → deep-insight-paper-overview;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-paper-search
nodes.description:
deep-insight-paper-search [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(import,来自 literature-engine/literature-search): AI 摘要级检索。引用须标 'AI-extracted' 而非 'paper states'。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-search → deep-insight-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-search)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-paper-research
nodes.description:
deep-insight-paper-research [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(import,来自 literature-engine/literature-research): 三遍 Keshav 法读全文。论文内容主张的权威来源。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-research → deep-insight-paper-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-research)。

nodes.name: gap-keyword-extraction
nodes.description:
gap-keyword-extraction [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 抽取 gap-indicating 句式('remains unclear'/'not explored'/'limited understanding')。

nodes.name: concept-matrix-construction
nodes.description:
concept-matrix-construction [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 构建 articles×concepts 覆盖矩阵,空格=gap 候选。

nodes.name: egm-construction
nodes.description:
egm-construction [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 构建结构化 Evidence Gap Map,按 intervention×outcome 或 method×domain 定轴并标证据密度。

nodes.name: gap-typology-classification
nodes.description:
gap-typology-classification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Miles 7-type 分类(理论/方法/实证/人群/实践/knowledge void/evidence)。

nodes.name: ahrq-reason-classification
nodes.description:
ahrq-reason-classification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: AHRQ 4-reason 框架分类 gap 成因(信息不足/有偏/不一致/未整合)。

nodes.name: cross-database-verification
nodes.description:
cross-database-verification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 跨库验证 gap(Semantic Scholar/Google Scholar/arXiv/领域库),区分库特异 vs 普遍。

nodes.name: false-gap-filtering
nodes.description:
false-gap-filtering [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 识别假 gap —— 搜索失败/已解决/本质不可答冒充研究空白。

nodes.name: temporal-sensitivity-testing
nodes.description:
temporal-sensitivity-testing [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 测 gap 是否跨 2/5/10 年窗口持续,判断 narrowing/widening/stable。

nodes.name: deep-insight-multi-criteria-scoring
nodes.description:
deep-insight-multi-criteria-scoring [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 多维 MCDA 评分 gap(重要/可行/新颖/紧迫/影响)加权。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 multi-criteria-scoring → deep-insight-multi-criteria-scoring(裸名 multi-criteria-scoring 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: stakeholder-confirmation
nodes.description:
stakeholder-confirmation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 模拟 researcher/practitioner/funder/end-user 视角验证 gap 优先级。

nodes.name: evidence-grading
nodes.description:
evidence-grading [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: GRADE/SOE 框架评估证据质量与降级原因。

nodes.name: gap-synthesis
nodes.description:
gap-synthesis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(收口): 汇编 gap 分析中间产物为最终报告 + 研究议程。

nodes.name: five-whys-drilling
nodes.description:
five-whys-drilling [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 5+ 层 Why 钻取从表象到根因,每层对证据校验。

nodes.name: ishikawa-decomposition
nodes.description:
ishikawa-decomposition [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 6M 鱼骨分解(方法/数据/理论/测量/研究者/环境)。

nodes.name: current-reality-tree
nodes.description:
current-reality-tree [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: TOC CRT —— 用充分因果逻辑连接 UDE 找 1-3 根因。

nodes.name: csh-12-question
nodes.description:
csh-12-question [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Ulrich CSH 12 问跨 4 维(动机/控制/专长/合法性)比较 is vs ought。boundary-critique 复用。

nodes.name: jtbd-mapping
nodes.description:
jtbd-mapping [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 映射 stakeholder Jobs-to-be-Done(功能/情感/社会),未服务 job=机会信号。

nodes.name: salience-classification
nodes.description:
salience-classification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Mitchell 框架按 Power/Legitimacy/Urgency 分类,识别被系统性排除方。

nodes.name: evaporating-cloud
nodes.description:
evaporating-cloud [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Goldratt Evaporating Cloud 建模冲突,暴露对立需求背后隐含假设以溶解冲突。

nodes.name: polarity-mapping
nodes.description:
polarity-mapping [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Johnson 极性 4 象限映射不可解张力,管理而非解决。

nodes.name: abstraction-laddering
nodes.description:
abstraction-laddering [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 在具体↔抽象间移动(上 3 层 Why / 下 3 层 How)找最具生产力的研究层次。

nodes.name: hmw-formulation
nodes.description:
hmw-formulation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 生成不同尺度 'How Might We' 问题(窄/中/宽),可执行不规定。

nodes.name: socratic-probing
nodes.description:
socratic-probing [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 6 类苏格拉底问题测试主张与假设,暴露弱点强化推理。

nodes.name: abp-vulnerability-classification
nodes.description:
abp-vulnerability-classification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 双轴分类假设 load-bearing × vulnerable,聚焦 High-Load×High-Vulnerable 象限。

nodes.name: clr-validation
nodes.description:
clr-validation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Goldratt 8 类合法保留(CLR)验证因果主张 —— 清晰/存在/充分/逻辑完整。root-cause 与 assumption-audit 共用。

nodes.name: deep-insight-assumption-enumeration
nodes.description:
deep-insight-assumption-enumeration [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 系统识别方法/模型全部假设 —— 结构/参数/分布/范围。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-enumeration → deep-insight-assumption-enumeration(裸名 assumption-enumeration 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: alternative-model-generation
nodes.description:
alternative-model-generation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 通过放松/替换/泛化特定假设生成替代模型形式。

nodes.name: convergence-assessment
nodes.description:
convergence-assessment [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 跨模型变体比对结果 —— 定量一致度 + 定性结论稳定性。

nodes.name: fragility-flagging
nodes.description:
fragility-flagging [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 识别哪个假设变动导致结论分歧,评 fragility 严重度与替代可信度。

nodes.name: variation-axis-definition
nodes.description:
variation-axis-definition [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 识别方法有效性可能变化的正交轴,确保独立/可测/张成参数空间。

nodes.name: controlled-perturbation
nodes.description:
controlled-perturbation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 沿定义轴系统变参,记录各点性能识别退化阈值。

nodes.name: deep-insight-validity-envelope-construction
nodes.description:
deep-insight-validity-envelope-construction [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 合并多轴扰动数据为多维 validity 描述 + 边界条件 + 交互效应。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 validity-envelope-construction → deep-insight-validity-envelope-construction(裸名 validity-envelope-construction 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: edge-case-generation
nodes.description:
edge-case-generation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 系统生成边界输入 —— 边界值/对抗构造/分布偏移/罕见组合/规模极端。scaling-frontier 复用。

nodes.name: failure-clustering
nodes.description:
failure-clustering [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 按机制(非症状)聚类失效,识别每簇共同触发 + 频率严重度。

nodes.name: scaling-regime-detection
nodes.description:
scaling-regime-detection [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 检测 scaling 行为 regime 切换 —— 行为质变的 breakpoint 及背后机制。failure-mode 与 scaling-frontier 共用。

nodes.name: boundary-synthesis
nodes.description:
boundary-synthesis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(收口): 汇编全部边界分析产物 —— validity envelope/robustness/failure catalog/scaling map/安全操作条件。

nodes.name: morris-screening
nodes.description:
morris-screening [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Morris 法算 elementary effects 快速区分重要 vs 不重要参数。

nodes.name: sobol-decomposition
nodes.description:
sobol-decomposition [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Sobol 方差分解 —— 算一阶+总阶敏感性指数精确归因方差。

nodes.name: interaction-detection
nodes.description:
interaction-detection [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 从 Sobol 结果检测并刻画显著参数交互。

nodes.name: deep-insight-assumption-extraction
nodes.description:
deep-insight-assumption-extraction [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 系统抽取方法/模型全部假设(陈述/隐含/边界/数学/实践)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-extraction → deep-insight-assumption-extraction(裸名 assumption-extraction 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: negation-definition
nodes.description:
negation-definition [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 为每个假设定义最强可信替代(negation)以支撑扰动分析。

nodes.name: re-derivation
nodes.description:
re-derivation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 在否定假设下重推结论,追踪推导从何处偏离原结论。

nodes.name: conclusion-sensitivity-measurement
nodes.description:
conclusion-sensitivity-measurement [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 量化结论跨全部假设否定的变化幅度,产出敏感性排序。

nodes.name: distribution-assignment
nodes.description:
distribution-assignment [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 据证据与领域知识为不确定参数赋概率分布。

nodes.name: monte-carlo-sampling
nodes.description:
monte-carlo-sampling [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 设计并执行 Monte Carlo 抽样策略经模型传播不确定性。

nodes.name: critical-path-identification
nodes.description:
critical-path-identification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 识别哪些输入不确定性对输出贡献最大,算 EVPI 做研究优先级。uncertainty-propagation 与 decision-sensitivity 共用。

nodes.name: sensitivity-synthesis
nodes.description:
sensitivity-synthesis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(收口): 汇编全部敏感性结果为带优先级建议的报告。

nodes.name: dominant-idea-identification
nodes.description:
dominant-idea-identification [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 识别约束领域思考的主导范式与假设。

nodes.name: deep-insight-provocation-generation
nodes.description:
deep-insight-provocation-generation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 生成 de Bono 横向思维 provocation(逃逸/反转/夸张/扭曲)挑战主导观念。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 provocation-generation → deep-insight-provocation-generation(裸名 provocation-generation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: consequence-following
nodes.description:
consequence-following [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 逐步追踪 provocation 的逻辑后果,提取可行洞见与新方向。

nodes.name: catwoe-analysis
nodes.description:
catwoe-analysis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 从特定 stakeholder 视角应用 Checkland CATWOE 揭示问题在该视角下的样貌。

nodes.name: reframing-matrix
nodes.description:
reframing-matrix [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 从 4 个专业视角重构问题,揭示各学科会聚焦什么。

nodes.name: governing-variable-surfacing
nodes.description:
governing-variable-surfacing [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: Argyris 框架识别 governing variable —— 驱动领域行为的未言明规则。

nodes.name: counter-assumption-generation
nodes.description:
counter-assumption-generation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 为 governing variable 生成辩证对立面 —— 相反成立的连贯替代世界观。

nodes.name: wickedness-scoring
nodes.description:
wickedness-scoring [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 对 Rittel 10 标准打分判定问题 tame/complex/wicked。

nodes.name: appreciative-discovery
nodes.description:
appreciative-discovery [sop] · deep-insight
SOP: 用 Appreciative Inquiry 搜索正向偏差并抽取可迁移原则。

nodes.name: reformulation-synthesis
nodes.description:
reformulation-synthesis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(收口): 汇编全部问题重构分析为带推荐新问题定义的报告。

nodes.name: evidence-synthesis
nodes.description:
evidence-synthesis [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(shared,跨 gap-analysis/insight/boundary): 把文献/web/分析多源证据编织为带显式强度评级的结构化论证与证据图。

nodes.name: deep-insight-multi-stakeholder-simulation
nodes.description:
deep-insight-multi-stakeholder-simulation [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(shared,跨 gap-analysis/insight/problem-reformulation): 模拟多 stakeholder 视角评估 gap/方法/提案,识别单视角盲点。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 multi-stakeholder-simulation → deep-insight-multi-stakeholder-simulation(裸名 multi-stakeholder-simulation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: deep-insight-assumption-surfacing
nodes.description:
deep-insight-assumption-surfacing [sop] · deep-insight
SOP(shared,跨 insight/sensitivity/problem-reformulation): 系统抽取方法/框架/论证中未经显式辩护就被默认的隐含假设。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-surfacing → deep-insight-assumption-surfacing(裸名 assumption-surfacing 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: de-anthropocentric-research-engine
nodes.description:
de-anthropocentric-research-engine [entry] · engine-core
MAIN ENTRY —— 整个 yogsoth-ai 研究生态的总编排器。 把用户从模糊的研究兴趣带到一份可执行的 Research Spec。管 3 个 phase:Phase1 北极星结晶 → Phase2 spec 生成(writing-specs)→ Phase3 spec 执行(由用户另开 session 调 executing-specs)。自身不执行任何 research campaign,只编排与转交。

nodes.name: writing-specs
nodes.description:
writing-specs [sop] · engine-core
生成一份人可读、机可执行的 Research Spec。 读 research-catalog,顺序跑 3 个提问 SOP(scope/campaign/constraint),产出 pipeline 大纲,扩写为完整 spec,最后强制过 spec-self-review。used-by: de-anthropocentric-research-engine

nodes.name: executing-specs
nodes.description:
executing-specs [sop] · engine-core
逐 Stage 执行 writing-specs 产出的 spec。 调用 spec 点名的 campaign/strategy,严格遵守 context 协议、±10% 偏离限制、回溯规则,支持多 session 恢复(spec 的 checkbox 状态即进度)。used-by: de-anthropocentric-research-engine

nodes.name: research-catalog
nodes.description:
research-catalog [sop] · engine-core
DARE 策略手册 + 全能力地图。(已合并原 skill-index)pipeline 总览(north-star→knowledge-acquisition→…→experiment-execution)、每个 campaign 的 strategy 与回溯条件、以及全部 campaign/strategy/tactic/sop 的能力清单。生成任何 spec 或路由自定义工作流前必读。

nodes.name: scope-clarification
nodes.description:
scope-clarification [sop] · engine-core
提问 SOP:确定研究边界。 问用户 2-3 个问题——深度 vs 广度、子主题取舍、输出野心(探索/可假设/可实验)、单域 vs 跨域。用 AskUserQuestion 多选。used-by: writing-specs

nodes.name: campaign-selection
nodes.description:
campaign-selection [sop] · engine-core
提问 SOP:选 campaign。 先展示 7 段默认 pipeline 作为起点,问用户要包含/强调/跳过哪些 stage,以及 ideation 偏好。用户只需说偏离。前置已读 research-catalog。used-by: writing-specs

nodes.name: constraint-elicitation
nodes.description:
constraint-elicitation [sop] · engine-core
提问 SOP:摸实际约束。 问时间预算(几个 session)、已有知识、工具偏好、硬性约束。时间预算直接决定 spec 颗粒度(session 越少,每 stage strategy 越少)。used-by: writing-specs

nodes.name: spec-self-review
nodes.description:
spec-self-review [sop] · engine-core
Spec 质量门(强制,不可跳过)。 6 项 checklist:占位符扫描 / 内部一致性 / 范围(3-10 session)/ 歧义 / context 协议 / 量化(所有完成标准必须是数字或可客观验证)。不通过就地修。used-by: writing-specs

nodes.name: experiment-design
nodes.description:
experiment-design [campaign] · experiment-execution
Campaign:What experiment to run? 把已验证假设转成严谨可执行的实验设计。orchestrates 5 strategies {factor-level-design, ablation-design, comparison-design, scaling-design, robustness-design} + 3 tactics,末端 spawn design-synthesis 出总报告。HARD-GATE:须有 falsifiable hypothesis(IV/DV)+ bounded scope + compute budget + baselines。

nodes.name: constraint-analysis
nodes.description:
constraint-analysis [campaign] · experiment-execution
Campaign:What limits us? 用 Goldratt TOC 找瓶颈/资源缺口/脆弱假设/依赖链/冲突。orchestrates 5 strategies {bottleneck-identification, resource-constraint, assumption-constraint, dependency-constraint, conflict-resolution} + 3 tactics,末端 spawn constraint-synthesis。HARD-GATE:方向已定 + scope 有界 + 资源可枚举 + stakeholder 明确。

nodes.name: scenario-planning
nodes.description:
scenario-planning [campaign] · experiment-execution
Campaign:What might the future look like? 构造多个未来情景并评估研究路径鲁棒性。orchestrates 5 strategies {morphological-/narrative-/stress-/competitive-/temporal-scenario},末端 spawn scenario-synthesis。HARD-GATE:方向已定 + 承认不确定性 + 指定时间窗 + 决策者认可。

nodes.name: implementation-planning
nodes.description:
implementation-planning [campaign] · experiment-execution
Campaign:How to do it + do it. 从实验设计到执行出结果:CPM 关键路径→前提树→写可执行 plan→subagent 执行→统计分析。orchestrates 5 strategies {critical-path-planning, prerequisite-planning, plan-writing, experiment-running, result-analysis},末端 spawn execution-synthesis。内化 superpowers:writing-plans + subagent-driven-development。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-factor-level-design
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-factor-level-design [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(ED):哪些因子在哪些水平上组合测试? Fisher 全因子/部分因子/Plackett-Burman/RSM/Taguchi。spawn SOPs {factor-identification, level-specification, design-matrix-construction, metric-specification, sample-size-estimation, experiment-config-generation} + tactics {budget-constrained-design, statistical-method-selection}。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 factor-level-design → experiment-execution-factor-level-design(裸名 factor-level-design 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: ablation-design
nodes.description:
ablation-design [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(ED):每个组件贡献什么? 系统/替换/组合/条件消融。spawn SOPs {ablation-component-mapping, baseline-selection, metric-specification, sample-size-estimation} + tactic {statistical-method-selection}。

nodes.name: comparison-design
nodes.description:
comparison-design [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(ED):比 baseline 强多少? 公平比较协议(Bouthillier)+多 baseline/多数据集+Bayesian 比较(Benavoli)。spawn SOPs {baseline-selection, metric-specification, sample-size-estimation, seed-protocol-design, environment-specification} + tactics {statistical-method-selection, reproducibility-protocol}。

nodes.name: scaling-design
nodes.description:
scaling-design [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(ED):性能如何随资源 scale? 神经 scaling law(Kaplan/Chinchilla)、data/model/inference scaling。spawn SOPs {factor-identification, level-specification, metric-specification, sample-size-estimation, design-matrix-construction} + tactics {statistical-method-selection, budget-constrained-design}。

nodes.name: robustness-design
nodes.description:
robustness-design [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(ED):在什么条件下方法失败? 分布漂移/对抗/跨域/噪声/压力测试。spawn SOPs {factor-identification, level-specification, baseline-selection, metric-specification, sample-size-estimation, design-matrix-construction} + tactic {statistical-method-selection}。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-bottleneck-identification
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-bottleneck-identification [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(CA):系统瓶颈在哪? TOC 5 Focusing Steps + Current Reality Tree。spawn SOPs {undesirable-effect-listing, causal-chain-tracing, core-conflict-extraction} + tactic {constraint-tree-building}。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 bottleneck-identification → experiment-execution-bottleneck-identification(裸名 bottleneck-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: resource-constraint
nodes.description:
resource-constraint [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(CA):资源够吗? demand/supply/gap 分析 + 关键链 + buffer。spawn SOPs {resource-quantification, critical-chain-identification, buffer-sizing} + tactic {sensitivity-ranking};出 Go/No-Go/Conditional。

nodes.name: assumption-constraint
nodes.description:
assumption-constraint [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(CA):哪些假设最脆弱? 脆弱性评分(confidence×evidence/testability)×blast radius。spawn SOPs {assumption-challenging, resource-quantification} + tactic {sensitivity-ranking};出 top-5 脆弱假设+验证路径。

nodes.name: dependency-constraint
nodes.description:
dependency-constraint [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(CA):什么必须先完成? 任务依赖 DAG + 关键路径/关键链。spawn SOPs {dependency-graph-construction, critical-chain-identification} + tactic {sensitivity-ranking}。

nodes.name: conflict-resolution
nodes.description:
conflict-resolution [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(CA):约束如何互相冲突? Goldratt Evaporating Cloud + 挑战假设 + injection + Future Reality Tree 验证。spawn SOPs {core-conflict-extraction, assumption-challenging, future-reality-projection} + tactic {constraint-breaking}。

nodes.name: morphological-scenario
nodes.description:
morphological-scenario [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(SP):所有可能组合? Zwicky 形态分析 + Ritchey CCA 一致性过滤。spawn SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, parameter-enumeration, consistency-pair-evaluation, scenario-narrative-construction, scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring, scenario-synthesis} + tactics {parameter-space-construction, cross-consistency-filtering, strategy-robustness-testing}。

nodes.name: narrative-scenario
nodes.description:
narrative-scenario [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(SP):每个未来的故事? Shell 情景法,2×2 高影响×高不确定轴。spawn SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, scenario-narrative-construction, scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring, scenario-synthesis} + tactics {cross-consistency-filtering, strategy-robustness-testing}。

nodes.name: stress-scenario
nodes.description:
stress-scenario [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(SP):最坏情况? 压力测试 + 失效模式枚举,extreme-but-plausible。spawn SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, worst-case-construction, scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring, scenario-synthesis} + tactic {strategy-robustness-testing}。

nodes.name: competitive-scenario
nodes.description:
competitive-scenario [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(SP):竞争者会做什么? 竞争情报情景规划,预测对手动作+时间窗+被抢发风险。spawn SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, competitive-move-prediction, timeline-projection, scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring, scenario-synthesis} + tactic {strategy-robustness-testing}。

nodes.name: temporal-scenario
nodes.description:
temporal-scenario [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(SP):随时间如何演化? 多时间窗(6mo/2yr/5yr)+ 技术 S 曲线 + 范式切换时机。spawn SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, timeline-projection, scenario-narrative-construction, scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring, scenario-synthesis} + tactic {strategy-robustness-testing}。

nodes.name: critical-path-planning
nodes.description:
critical-path-planning [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(IP):最短执行路径? CPM 前/后向 pass + 资源平整 + Critical Chain buffer。spawn SOPs {activity-listing, dependency-sequencing, duration-estimation, critical-path-calculation} + tactic {task-decomposition}。

nodes.name: prerequisite-planning
nodes.description:
prerequisite-planning [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(IP):路上有什么障碍? TOC Prerequisite Tree + Transition Tree。spawn SOPs {obstacle-identification, intermediate-objective-design} + tactic {task-decomposition};障碍不可破则 escalate 回 experiment-design。

nodes.name: plan-writing
nodes.description:
plan-writing [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(IP):如何写成可执行 plan? 内化 superpowers:writing-plans——bite-sized 任务、绝对路径、TDD、零 TBD/TODO。spawn SOP {plan-formatting} + tactic {task-decomposition}。

nodes.name: experiment-running
nodes.description:
experiment-running [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(IP):如何执行? 内化 superpowers:subagent-driven-development——每任务 fresh subagent、三段 review、DONE/BLOCKED/NEEDS_CONTEXT。spawn SOPs {implementer-dispatch, execution-monitoring, result-collection} + tactics {subagent-execution-loop, checkpoint-and-recover}。

nodes.name: result-analysis
nodes.description:
result-analysis [strategy] · experiment-execution
Strategy(IP):结果说明了什么? frequentist+resampling+Bayesian 三层分析 + 效应量 + 可复现验证。spawn SOPs {statistical-testing, reproducibility-verification, execution-synthesis} + tactic {result-validation-loop}。

nodes.name: statistical-method-selection
nodes.description:
statistical-method-selection [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(ED):选统计方法。 按数据特征(分布/样本量/配对)选 parametric/non-parametric/Bayesian。orchestrates SOPs {metric-specification, sample-size-estimation}。

nodes.name: reproducibility-protocol
nodes.description:
reproducibility-protocol [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(ED):可复现协议。 评估复现级别(exact/statistical/conceptual),锁种子+环境。orchestrates SOPs {seed-protocol-design, environment-specification}。

nodes.name: budget-constrained-design
nodes.description:
budget-constrained-design [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(ED):预算约束下优化设计。 估单 run 成本→算 max runs→选最信息高效设计。orchestrates SOPs {factor-identification, level-specification, design-matrix-construction}。

nodes.name: constraint-tree-building
nodes.description:
constraint-tree-building [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(CA):构建 Current Reality Tree。 从 UDEs 经因果链到核心冲突。orchestrates SOPs {undesirable-effect-listing, causal-chain-tracing, core-conflict-extraction}。

nodes.name: sensitivity-ranking
nodes.description:
sensitivity-ranking [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(CA):按敏感度排约束。 Sensitivity=gap×chain-position×assumption-vulnerability。orchestrates SOPs {resource-quantification, assumption-challenging, critical-chain-identification}。

nodes.name: constraint-breaking
nodes.description:
constraint-breaking [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(CA):完整破约束循环。 抽冲突→挑战假设→生成 injection→FRT 投射验证。orchestrates SOPs {core-conflict-extraction, assumption-challenging, future-reality-projection};3 次 injection 不解则 flag hard constraint。

nodes.name: parameter-space-construction
nodes.description:
parameter-space-construction [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(SP):构建形态场。 识别 driver→枚举参数→校验 MECE+空间可计算(<500 组合)。orchestrates SOPs {scenario-driver-identification, parameter-enumeration}。

nodes.name: cross-consistency-filtering
nodes.description:
cross-consistency-filtering [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(SP):CCA 过滤形态场。 成对一致性评估→过滤→排名→留 4-8 个 config 做叙事。orchestrates SOPs {consistency-pair-evaluation, scenario-narrative-construction}。

nodes.name: strategy-robustness-testing
nodes.description:
strategy-robustness-testing [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(SP):评研究路径鲁棒性。 逐情景 impact 评估→编矩阵→鲁棒性打分+pivot trigger。orchestrates SOPs {scenario-impact-assessment, robustness-scoring}。

nodes.name: task-decomposition
nodes.description:
task-decomposition [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(IP):分解实验设计为任务 plan。 enumerate→sequence→estimate→format 四相,带循环依赖/占位符校验。orchestrates SOPs {activity-listing, dependency-sequencing, duration-estimation, plan-formatting}。

nodes.name: subagent-execution-loop
nodes.description:
subagent-execution-loop [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(IP):fresh subagent 执行循环。 找 ready 任务→checkpoint→dispatch→monitor→收集,带 retry(max2)/deadlock/budget 控制。orchestrates SOPs {implementer-dispatch, execution-monitoring, result-collection}。

nodes.name: checkpoint-and-recover
nodes.description:
checkpoint-and-recover [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(IP):风险操作前 checkpoint+优雅恢复。 监控异常→验证结果→TRANSIENT/CORRUPTING/FATAL 分级回滚。orchestrates SOPs {execution-monitoring, result-collection}。

nodes.name: result-validation-loop
nodes.description:
result-validation-loop [tactic] · experiment-execution
Tactic(IP):结果验证循环。 collect→统计检验→ROPE 判定→复现 re-run(ICC)→synthesis。orchestrates SOPs {result-collection, statistical-testing, reproducibility-verification, execution-synthesis}。

nodes.name: design-synthesis
nodes.description:
design-synthesis [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP(ED 末端):合成完整实验设计报告。 汇总所有上游 SOP 输出,做一致性检查/可行性评估/风险盘点——实验设计阶段的最终质量门。subagent。

nodes.name: experiment-config-generation
nodes.description:
experiment-config-generation [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:生成可执行实验配置文件(YAML/JSON)。 把 design matrix+环境+种子+metric 转成可直接跑的 config。subagent。shared with implementation-planning。

nodes.name: factor-identification
nodes.description:
factor-identification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:识别 IV/DV/控制变量。 subagent。

nodes.name: level-specification
nodes.description:
level-specification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:为每个因子定水平(2-5 档)+ spacing 策略。 subagent。

nodes.name: design-matrix-construction
nodes.description:
design-matrix-construction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:构建实验设计矩阵。 含正交性、平衡、随机化 run order。subagent。

nodes.name: metric-specification
nodes.description:
metric-specification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:定 primary/secondary metric + 预注册显著性阈值。 跨所有 ED strategy 共用。subagent。

nodes.name: sample-size-estimation
nodes.description:
sample-size-estimation [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:power analysis 估所需样本量/重复数。 subagent。

nodes.name: baseline-selection
nodes.description:
baseline-selection [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:选 baseline(SOTA/simple/oracle)。 出带来源的 ranked list。subagent。

nodes.name: ablation-component-mapping
nodes.description:
ablation-component-mapping [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:把系统架构映射成可消融单元。 含依赖、移除策略、预期影响。subagent。

nodes.name: seed-protocol-design
nodes.description:
seed-protocol-design [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:设计随机种子策略。 识别所有 randomness source + 种子传播方案。subagent。

nodes.name: environment-specification
nodes.description:
environment-specification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:定完整运行环境规格(硬件/软件/数据/配置)。 subagent。shared with implementation-planning。

nodes.name: undesirable-effect-listing
nodes.description:
undesirable-effect-listing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:列系统 UDEs(可观察症状+证据+严重度)。 subagent。

nodes.name: causal-chain-tracing
nodes.description:
causal-chain-tracing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:用 IF...THEN...BECAUSE 把 UDE 追溯到根因。 subagent。

nodes.name: core-conflict-extraction
nodes.description:
core-conflict-extraction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:抽核心冲突为 Evaporating Cloud(A-B-C-D-D')。 每箭头带假设。subagent。

nodes.name: resource-quantification
nodes.description:
resource-quantification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:量化各类资源 demand/supply/gap + 严重度。 subagent。

nodes.name: critical-chain-identification
nodes.description:
critical-chain-identification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:识别关键链(含资源争用的最长路径)。 Goldratt CC 法。subagent。shared。

nodes.name: buffer-sizing
nodes.description:
buffer-sizing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:算 project/feeding/resource buffer。 Goldratt 法。subagent。shared。

nodes.name: assumption-challenging
nodes.description:
assumption-challenging [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:系统质疑各假设的有效性。 出 confidence 评分+证据。subagent。跨 strategy/campaign 共用。

nodes.name: future-reality-projection
nodes.description:
future-reality-projection [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:用 Future Reality Tree 投射 injection 效果。 验证是否解冲突而不生新 UDE。subagent。

nodes.name: dependency-graph-construction
nodes.description:
dependency-graph-construction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:从 WBS 建任务依赖图(邻接表)。 含并行机会+汇聚点。subagent。shared。

nodes.name: scenario-driver-identification
nodes.description:
scenario-driver-identification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:用 PESTEL 识别 5-8 个不确定性 driver。 带 impact×uncertainty 评分。subagent。

nodes.name: parameter-enumeration
nodes.description:
parameter-enumeration [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:为每个 driver 枚举 MECE 取值,出 Zwicky Box。 subagent。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-consistency-pair-evaluation
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-consistency-pair-evaluation [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:CCA 成对一致性评估。 出 CCA 矩阵+幸存 config。subagent。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 consistency-pair-evaluation → experiment-execution-consistency-pair-evaluation(裸名 consistency-pair-evaluation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: scenario-narrative-construction
nodes.description:
scenario-narrative-construction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:为参数 config 建丰富内一致叙事(Shell 法)。 含因果逻辑/signpost。subagent。

nodes.name: scenario-impact-assessment
nodes.description:
scenario-impact-assessment [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:多维评估情景对研究路径的影响(带评分+理由)。 subagent。

nodes.name: robustness-scoring
nodes.description:
robustness-scoring [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:算鲁棒性指数(0-100)+敏感性分析+pivot trigger。 subagent。

nodes.name: worst-case-construction
nodes.description:
worst-case-construction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:构造 extreme-but-plausible 最坏情景。 含 breaking point/failure cascade/recovery。subagent。

nodes.name: competitive-move-prediction
nodes.description:
competitive-move-prediction [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:预测竞争者下一步动作+时间线+抢发风险。 subagent。

nodes.name: timeline-projection
nodes.description:
timeline-projection [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:外推研究 landscape 时间线。 投射里程碑+置信带+拐点。subagent。

nodes.name: scenario-synthesis
nodes.description:
scenario-synthesis [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP(SP 末端):合成完整情景组合报告。 含战略建议/应急计划/监测框架。subagent。

nodes.name: activity-listing
nodes.description:
activity-listing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:从实验设计枚举所有实施活动。 subagent。

nodes.name: dependency-sequencing
nodes.description:
dependency-sequencing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:定活动 predecessor/successor 关系+合法执行序。 subagent。

nodes.name: duration-estimation
nodes.description:
duration-estimation [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:三点 PERT 估活动时长(乐观/最可能/悲观/期望/方差)。 subagent。

nodes.name: critical-path-calculation
nodes.description:
critical-path-calculation [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:CPM 前/后向 pass + float 计算,识别关键路径。 subagent。

nodes.name: obstacle-identification
nodes.description:
obstacle-identification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:TOC Prerequisite Tree 列阻碍直接达成目标的障碍。 带严重度+阻塞关系。subagent。

nodes.name: intermediate-objective-design
nodes.description:
intermediate-objective-design [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:为每个障碍设计可验证的中间目标(IO)。 带验证标准+依赖序。subagent。

nodes.name: plan-formatting
nodes.description:
plan-formatting [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:格式化为 bite-sized 可执行 plan(superpowers:writing-plans)。 HARD-GATE:零 TBD/TODO/占位符。 subagent。

nodes.name: implementer-dispatch
nodes.description:
implementer-dispatch [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:按复杂度选模型(Haiku/Sonnet/Opus)+构造任务 prompt 派发执行 subagent。 subagent。

nodes.name: execution-monitoring
nodes.description:
execution-monitoring [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:监控运行中 subagent。 出 DONE/BLOCKED/NEEDS_CONTEXT/TIMEOUT + 异常报告。subagent。

nodes.name: result-collection
nodes.description:
result-collection [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:收集实验输出(metric/log/artifact)成结构化结果集 + 完整度评估。 subagent。

nodes.name: statistical-testing
nodes.description:
statistical-testing [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:执行预注册统计检验(bootstrap/permutation/Bayesian ROPE)。 出效应量+CI+ROPE 判定。subagent。shared with experiment-design。

nodes.name: reproducibility-verification
nodes.description:
reproducibility-verification [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP:换种子 re-run 比对,ICC+方差分解评估可复现性。 subagent。shared with experiment-design。

nodes.name: execution-synthesis
nodes.description:
execution-synthesis [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP(IP 末端):合成完整执行报告。 findings+统计结论+复现性+next steps。subagent。

nodes.name: constraint-synthesis
nodes.description:
constraint-synthesis [sop] · experiment-execution
SOP(CA 末端):合成约束分析报告。 整合 tree-building/sensitivity/breaking 出优先级行动+风险评估。subagent。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-quality-gate-check
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-quality-gate-check [sop] · experiment-execution
Shared SOP:质量门校验(PASS/FAIL+gap list)。 独立评估,免 producing agent 的沉没成本偏差。所有 campaign 可用。subagent。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 quality-gate-check → experiment-execution-quality-gate-check(裸名 quality-gate-check 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-saturation-detection
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-saturation-detection [sop] · experiment-execution
Shared SOP:信息饱和检测——何时停止搜索/分析。 独立评估边际信息增益。所有 campaign 可用。subagent。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 saturation-detection → experiment-execution-saturation-detection(裸名 saturation-detection 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-web-search
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-web-search [sop] · experiment-execution
