Import SOP:快速 web 扫描发现(源自 web-browsing skill)。 调用 brave_web_search/brave_news_search。所有 campaign 可用。跨包导入,源 skill 不在本包。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-search → experiment-execution-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-web-research
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-web-research [sop] · experiment-execution
Import SOP:深度整页内容分析(源自 web-browsing skill)。 调用 apify rag-web-browser / brave_llm_context。所有 campaign 可用。跨包导入。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-research → experiment-execution-web-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-research)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-paper-overview
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-paper-overview [sop] · experiment-execution
Import SOP:论文 landscape 扫描(源自 literature-engine skill)。 调用 semantic-scholar/alphaxiv。所有 campaign 可用。跨包导入。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-overview → experiment-execution-paper-overview;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-paper-search
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-paper-search [sop] · experiment-execution
Import SOP:读论文 AI 摘要(源自 literature-engine skill)。 调用 alphaxiv get_paper_content / semantic-scholar。所有 campaign 可用。跨包导入。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-search → experiment-execution-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-search)。

nodes.name: experiment-execution-paper-research
nodes.description:
experiment-execution-paper-research [sop] · experiment-execution
Import SOP:读论文原始全文(源自 literature-engine skill)。 调用 alphaxiv answer_pdf_queries / get_paper_content(fullText)。所有 campaign 可用。跨包导入。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-research → experiment-execution-paper-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-research)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-gap-prioritization
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-gap-prioritization [campaign] · hypothesis-formation
Campaign:哪些 gap 最值得攻击? 将上游一批未排序 gaps 转化为带优先级的攻击列表(不发现新 gap,只对已有 gap 做决策)。编排 5 个 strategy(multi-criteria-ranking 默认 / evidence-based / stakeholder-weighted / portfolio-optimization / rapid-triage)+ pairwise-comparison tactic。HARD-GATE:≥3 个已识别 gaps。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 gap-prioritization → hypothesis-formation-gap-prioritization(裸名 gap-prioritization 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formulation
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formulation [campaign] · hypothesis-formation
Campaign:如何将 insight 转化为可测试假设? 把模糊的 gap/现象转化为精确、可证伪、有边界条件的假设。编排 5 个推理 strategy(deductive 理论→预测 / inductive 数据→规律 / abductive 异常→最佳解释 / competing-construction / operationalization)+ 终局 hypothesis-synthesis。HARD-GATE:≥1 个明确 gap/insight。

nodes.name: research-question
nodes.description:
research-question [campaign] · hypothesis-formation
Campaign:如何将假设细化为精确研究问题? 把可测试假设转化为有 scope、success criteria、sub-questions 的框架化 RQ(止步于问题形成,不做实验设计)。编排 5 个 strategy(framework-guided / scope-calibration / decomposition / comparative / feasibility-constrained)+ 终局 question-synthesis。HARD-GATE:≥1 个明确假设。

nodes.name: multi-criteria-ranking
nodes.description:
multi-criteria-ranking [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy(默认):多维度加权评分排序。 将"哪个 gap 更好"分解为重要性/可行性/新颖性/影响力四独立维度,加权求和重组排序。适用 5-20 个 gap。编排 scoring-matrix-construction + priority-sensitivity-testing 两 tactic,直调 gap-normalization。

nodes.name: evidence-based-prioritization
nodes.description:
evidence-based-prioritization [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:基于证据强度的 AHRQ PiCMe 评估。 综合分 = 重要性 ×(1−证据充分度),让证据最薄弱、影响最大的 gap 浮出。适用来自严谨文献调研的 gap。编排 scoring-matrix-construction,直调 importance-scoring/priority-synthesis/gap-normalization。

nodes.name: stakeholder-weighted-ranking
nodes.description:
stakeholder-weighted-ranking [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:按利益相关者视角加权排序。 为每类相关方构建独立权重向量,分别排序后 Borda 取共识,识别跨视角稳健 gap 与分歧 gap。编排 scoring-matrix-construction + priority-sensitivity-testing,直调 gap-normalization。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-portfolio-optimization
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-portfolio-optimization [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:gap 组合即投资组合。 Markowitz 式收益/风险/相关性/多样性分析,选有效前沿上的最优 gap 组合。适用 20+ 个 gap。编排 scoring-matrix-construction + priority-sensitivity-testing,直调 gap-normalization。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 portfolio-optimization → hypothesis-formation-portfolio-optimization(裸名 portfolio-optimization 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: rapid-triage
nodes.description:
rapid-triage [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:快速粗筛(两轮过滤)。 二元 Keep/Drop 过滤 + 轻量两维评分,把 50+ gap 压缩到可精排规模。常作为 multi-criteria-ranking/portfolio-optimization 的前置。编排 scoring-matrix-construction,直调 gap-normalization/priority-synthesis。

nodes.name: deductive-hypothesis-generation
nodes.description:
deductive-hypothesis-generation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:从理论演绎推导假设。 Theory→Mechanism→Variable Relationship→Testable Prediction,每步可追溯。适用理论成熟、gap 是理论-现实偏差的领域。编排 theory-mechanism-extraction + falsifiability-audit 两 tactic(覆盖全部 7 个 SOP)。

nodes.name: inductive-hypothesis-generation
nodes.description:
inductive-hypothesis-generation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:从数据/观察归纳提炼假设。 Observe patterns→Extract regularity→Generalize cautiously→Testable claim,核心风险是过度泛化。适用理论空白但有经验模式的领域。编排 anomaly-driven-abduction + falsifiability-audit,直调 variable-identification/relationship-specification。

nodes.name: abductive-hypothesis-generation
nodes.description:
abductive-hypothesis-generation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:面对异常的最佳解释推理。 Anomaly→候选解释→可信度排序→最佳解释即假设(奥卡姆剃刀+一致性+可检验)。适用观察到现有理论无法解释的异常。编排 anomaly-driven-abduction tactic,直调 falsifiability-check。

nodes.name: competing-hypothesis-construction
nodes.description:
competing-hypothesis-construction [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:为同一现象构建多个竞争假设。 对抗 confirmation bias,强制机制层面真正不同的并行解释 + 区分性预测。编排 competing-hypothesis-matrix tactic,直调 falsifiability-check。

nodes.name: hypothesis-operationalization
nodes.description:
hypothesis-operationalization [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:将 working hypothesis 精确化为可测试形式。 Abstract→Concrete 五层(构念澄清/变量识别/操作定义/边界条件/可证伪标准)。适用已有方向性假设需 formalize。编排 falsifiability-audit tactic,直调 variable-identification。

nodes.name: framework-guided-formulation
nodes.description:
framework-guided-formulation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:选 RQ 框架并系统应用。 据研究类型匹配 PICO/SPIDER/SPICE/ECLIPSE,逐组件填充不留空。适用研究类型明确、有标准框架时。编排 framework-selection-and-application + question-refinement-loop 两 tactic(覆盖全部 SOP)。

nodes.name: scope-calibration
nodes.description:
scope-calibration [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:调整 RQ 范围(zoom in/out)。 问题太宽则加约束缩小,太窄则提抽象层级扩大,迭代到"金发姑娘"粒度。编排 question-refinement-loop tactic(覆盖 scope-assessment/finer/success-criteria)。

nodes.name: decomposition-formulation
nodes.description:
decomposition-formulation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:将复杂 RQ 分解为可独立回答的子问题。 MECE + 独立性 + 覆盖性,按因果/变量/条件/层级/时序分解。适用单一实验无法回答时。编排 sub-question-decomposition tactic,直调 finer-criteria-check。

nodes.name: comparative-formulation
nodes.description:
comparative-formulation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:构建对比性 RQ(A vs B)。 明确比较对象/维度/控制/阈值,论证公平性(非 strawman),用 PICO 的 C 组件结构化。编排 framework-selection-and-application tactic,直调 finer-criteria-check/success-criteria-definition。

nodes.name: feasibility-constrained-formulation
nodes.description:
feasibility-constrained-formulation [strategy] · hypothesis-formation
Strategy:在资源约束下重塑 RQ。 约束即设计参数 — 缩范围/用 proxy/分阶段,保核心价值并显式声明 trade-off。适用理想问题超出资源时。编排 question-refinement-loop tactic(覆盖 scope/finer/success-criteria)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-scoring-matrix-construction
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-scoring-matrix-construction [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:构建多维度评分矩阵。 并行/串行调用各评分 SOP,为所有 gap 构建 gaps × 维度综合评估矩阵。编排 importance/feasibility/novelty/impact-scoring + ahrq-picme-assessment 五 SOP。S=3 dims 并行 / M=4 dims / L=5 dims + PiCMe 串行。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 scoring-matrix-construction → hypothesis-formation-scoring-matrix-construction(裸名 scoring-matrix-construction 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: pairwise-comparison
nodes.description:
pairwise-comparison [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:AHP 风格成对比较排序。 当绝对评分不可靠时,两两相对比较 + 一致性检验(CR<0.1,矛盾触发修正轮)。编排 gap-pairwise-judgment → consistency-check → priority-synthesis。Deep 模式先用 scoring-matrix-construction 筛到 ≤15 个。

nodes.name: priority-sensitivity-testing
nodes.description:
priority-sensitivity-testing [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:权重扰动检验排序稳健性。 建基线权重 → ±20% 扰动 → 稳定性判定(stable/sensitive/unstable)。编排 ahp-weighting → weight-perturbation → priority-synthesis。

nodes.name: theory-mechanism-extraction
nodes.description:
theory-mechanism-extraction [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:演绎路径核心。 理论→机制→变量→关系逐层拆解,不可跳步,产出假设候选原材料。编排 theory-identification → mechanism-extraction → variable-identification → relationship-specification 四 SOP。

nodes.name: anomaly-driven-abduction
nodes.description:
anomaly-driven-abduction [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:归纳/溯因路径。 精确描述异常 → 系统生成候选解释 → 按可信度排序,三步缺一不可。编排 anomaly-characterization → explanation-generation → plausibility-ranking。

nodes.name: falsifiability-audit
nodes.description:
falsifiability-audit [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:假设质量保证(质检非生成)。 假设形成的最终关卡 — 检验可证伪性 → 操作化 → 边界条件,不允许跳步或带病推进。编排 falsifiability-check → operationalization → boundary-condition-specification。

nodes.name: competing-hypothesis-matrix
nodes.description:
competing-hypothesis-matrix [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:多假设管理对抗 confirmation bias。 生成竞争假设 → 设计区分性预测 → 构建比较矩阵,三步不可颠倒。编排 competing-hypothesis-generation → discriminating-prediction-design → hypothesis-comparison-matrix。

nodes.name: framework-selection-and-application
nodes.description:
framework-selection-and-application [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:选 RQ 框架并应用。 先 framework-matching 选框架,再据推荐调对应 application SOP。编排 framework-matching → {pico / spider / spice / eclipse}-application(据研究类型分派)。

nodes.name: question-refinement-loop
nodes.description:
question-refinement-loop [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:迭代精化 RQ 直到 FINER 5/5。 检验→识别问题→针对性修正→重新检验循环(最多 3 轮)。编排 finer-criteria-check + scope-assessment(F 不通过时)+ success-criteria-definition(收尾)。

nodes.name: sub-question-decomposition
nodes.description:
sub-question-decomposition [tactic] · hypothesis-formation
Tactic:将主问题分解为子问题层级。 生成子问题→映射依赖→设计回答顺序,严格串行,每步产出是下步输入。编排 sub-question-generation → dependency-mapping → answering-sequence-design。

nodes.name: gap-normalization
nodes.description:
gap-normalization [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:统一不同来源 gap 格式为标准 GapRecord。 提取 id/title/description/domain/source,缺字段标 incomplete 而非丢弃。所有 gap-prioritization strategy 的第一步。

nodes.name: importance-scoring
nodes.description:
importance-scoring [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:评估 gap 学术与实践重要性(1-5)。 领域影响40%+理论贡献30%+实践价值30%。输入须 status:complete 的 GapRecord。

nodes.name: feasibility-scoring
nodes.description:
feasibility-scoring [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:评估 gap 可攻击性(1-5)+ 瓶颈。 方法可用性/数据可获取性/资源需求/时间框架四维等权,提取 score≤2 的瓶颈维度。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-novelty-scoring
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-novelty-scoring [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:评估 gap 新颖性(1-5)+ 差异化方向。 创新潜力+先进性两维。用 literature-engine + web-browsing 检索近 3 年现有工作。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 novelty-scoring → hypothesis-formation-novelty-scoring(裸名 novelty-scoring 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: impact-scoring
nodes.description:
impact-scoring [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:评估 gap 潜在影响力(1-5)。 识别受益方,影响广度 × 影响深度两维等权。

nodes.name: ahrq-picme-assessment
nodes.description:
ahrq-picme-assessment [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:AHRQ PiCMe 框架 6 维度评估 gap。 Population/Intervention/Comparator/Metrics/Evidence + 综合判定(strong/moderate/weak),生成研究问题草稿。L tier 或 biomedical 领域用。

nodes.name: ahp-weighting
nodes.description:
ahp-weighting [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:AHP 层次分析法定权重。 Saaty 1-9 标度两两比较 → 特征向量 → 权重,计算并报告一致性比率 CR(>0.1 警告)。维度数 [2,9]。

nodes.name: weight-perturbation
nodes.description:
weight-perturbation [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:扰动权重检验排序稳定性。 ±20% 各维度,算 Kendall τ,判定 stable(τ≥0.8)/sensitive/unstable。

nodes.name: gap-pairwise-judgment
nodes.description:
gap-pairwise-judgment [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:对两个 gap 逐标准相对优先级判断。 各标准独立比较 → Saaty 标度赋值(不允许 tie)。pairwise-comparison 的第一步。

nodes.name: consistency-check
nodes.description:
consistency-check [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:检验 pairwise 矩阵传递一致性。 算 CR,识别违反 a[i][k]≈a[i][j]×a[j][k] 的不一致三元组并建议修正。

nodes.name: priority-synthesis
nodes.description:
priority-synthesis [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:综合评分产出最终 gap 优先级列表。 AHP 权重加权汇总 → 降序排列 → 前 N 名攻击路径建议(方法/数据源/预期突破/时间)。gap-prioritization 终局 SOP。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-quality-gate-check
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-quality-gate-check [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Shared SOP:通用质量门检查。 格式完整性/逻辑一致性/引用完整性/可操作性/无歧义性五维 PASS/FAIL。三 campaign 共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 quality-gate-check → hypothesis-formation-quality-gate-check(裸名 quality-gate-check 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-saturation-detection
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-saturation-detection [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Shared SOP:判断活动是否已达信息饱和。 增量分析 + 收敛检测,判定 SATURATED/NOT_SATURATED 决定是否继续迭代。三 campaign 共享,需 ≥2 轮迭代数据。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 saturation-detection → hypothesis-formation-saturation-detection(裸名 saturation-detection 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: theory-identification
nodes.description:
theory-identification [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:识别与 gap 相关的理论框架。 提取 core_claim + 适用性(high/med/low),≥3 条最多 8 条。用 literature-engine + web-browsing 文献扫描。 theory-mechanism-extraction 第一步。

nodes.name: mechanism-extraction
nodes.description:
mechanism-extraction [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:从理论提取因果机制链。 X→mediator→Y 因果链 + 机制图,每理论 ≥1 条、总计 ≥2 条。输入 theory-identification 的理论描述。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-variable-identification
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-variable-identification [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:从机制识别变量并标注角色。 IV/DV/mediator/moderator/control/confound + 操作化可能性评估,≥2 变量(1 IV+1 DV)。输入 mechanism-extraction 的机制链。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 variable-identification → hypothesis-formation-variable-identification(裸名 variable-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: relationship-specification
nodes.description:
relationship-specification [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:指定变量间关系方向与形式。 正/负/双向 + 线性/U型/阈值/饱和 + 理论依据,争议时标注竞争预测。输入 variable-identification 的变量对。

nodes.name: anomaly-characterization
nodes.description:
anomaly-characterization [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:描述分类异常现象。 观察 vs 预期 + 偏差量化 + 排除平凡解释 + 异常分类。溯因推理精确起点。anomaly-driven-abduction 第一步。

nodes.name: explanation-generation
nodes.description:
explanation-generation [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:为异常生成候选解释。 发散思维 ≥3 个机制上不同的解释 + 各自可观察预测 + 证据一致性。输入 anomaly-characterization 输出。

nodes.name: plausibility-ranking
nodes.description:
plausibility-ranking [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:候选解释多维加权排序。 证据一致性0.5/简约性0.3/解释范围0.2 加权,需 ≥2 候选。anomaly-driven-abduction 终步。

nodes.name: competing-hypothesis-generation
nodes.description:
competing-hypothesis-generation [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:为同一现象生成机制上不同的竞争假设。 替代机制/替代理论/反向因果,≥2 个真正不同(非主假设变体),标注 shared/unique prediction。

nodes.name: discriminating-prediction-design
nodes.description:
discriminating-prediction-design [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:设计区分竞争假设的关键预测。 逐对找分歧点 → 设计判决性观察/实验 + 可行性评估。需 ≥2 竞争假设(含 unique_prediction)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-comparison-matrix
nodes.description:
hypothesis-comparison-matrix [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:构建竞争假设多维对比矩阵。 机制类型/证据支持/可测试性/简约性/范围/理论依据,高亮关键差异 + 综合推荐。需 ≥2 假设。

nodes.name: falsifiability-check
nodes.description:
falsifiability-check [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:Popper 可证伪性检验。 推导 ≥2 可观察预测 + 否定预测 → 判定 falsifiable/not/needs_revision,不可证伪给修改建议。

nodes.name: operationalization
nodes.description:
operationalization [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:抽象概念操作化为可测量指标。 概念分析 → 指标选择 → 测量方法 → 内容/构念/标准三效度论证。输入 variable-identification 输出。

nodes.name: boundary-condition-specification
nodes.description:
boundary-condition-specification [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:指定假设成立的边界条件。 时间/空间/人群/条件/排除五类边界,防过度泛化,判定 generalizability。需假设草案含 statement+mechanism。

nodes.name: hypothesis-synthesis
nodes.description:
hypothesis-synthesis [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:综合中间产物产出最终假设集。 收集 deductive/inductive/abductive 全路径假设 → 去重 → 6 组件完整性检查 → 排序 → 关系说明(互补/竞争/独立/层级)。hypothesis-formulation 终局 SOP。

nodes.name: framework-matching
nodes.description:
framework-matching [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:据研究类型匹配 RQ 框架。 量化→PICO / 定性→SPIDER / 评估→SPICE / 混合→ECLIPSE,输出推荐 + fit_score 候选对比。framework-selection-and-application 第一步。

nodes.name: pico-application
nodes.description:
pico-application [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:应用 PICO/PICOTS 框架。 Population/Intervention/Comparison/Outcome(+Time/Setting)逐组件填充并组装 RQ 句子。量化/干预研究用。

nodes.name: spider-application
nodes.description:
spider-application [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:应用 SPIDER 框架。 Sample/Phenomenon of Interest/Design/Evaluation/Research type。定性研究用。

nodes.name: spice-application
nodes.description:
spice-application [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:应用 SPICE 框架。 Setting/Perspective/Intervention/Comparison/Evaluation。评估研究用。

nodes.name: eclipse-application
nodes.description:
eclipse-application [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:应用 ECLIPSE 框架。 Expectation/Client group/Location/Impact/Professionals/Service/Evaluation。混合方法研究用。

nodes.name: scope-assessment
nodes.description:
scope-assessment [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:评估 RQ 范围。 判定 TOO_BROAD/APPROPRIATE/TOO_NARROW + 调整建议。question-refinement-loop 中 F 不通过时调用。

nodes.name: finer-criteria-check
nodes.description:
finer-criteria-check [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:FINER 5 项标准检验 RQ。 Feasible/Interesting/Novel/Ethical/Relevant 逐项 PASS/FAIL + 修正建议。question-refinement-loop 的检验核心。

nodes.name: success-criteria-definition
nodes.description:
success-criteria-definition [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:定义 RQ 可测量成功标准。 Full/Partial success + Failure 条件 + 阈值 + 测量方式。需 RQ 已通过 FINER。

nodes.name: sub-question-generation
nodes.description:
sub-question-generation [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:将主 RQ 分解为子问题。 按因果/变量/条件/层级/时序分解 + MECE 检验 + 独立性论证 + 覆盖性检验。sub-question-decomposition 第一步。

nodes.name: dependency-mapping
nodes.description:
dependency-mapping [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:映射子问题间依赖关系。 强/弱依赖标注 + 循环检测 + 关键路径 + 并行机会。需 ≥2 子问题。

nodes.name: answering-sequence-design
nodes.description:
answering-sequence-design [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:设计子问题最优回答顺序。 拓扑排序 + 并行分组 + 高风险优先(fail fast),分阶段计划。输入 dependency-mapping 的依赖图。

nodes.name: question-synthesis
nodes.description:
question-synthesis [sop] · hypothesis-formation
SOP:综合中间产物产出最终 RQ 集。 收集框架应用/scope/FINER/子问题 → 一致性检查 → 6 组件完整性检查 → 格式化。research-question 终局 SOP。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-paper-overview
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-paper-overview [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Import SOP(来自 literature-engine):论文快速扫描。 abstract + metadata + 相关性判断。直接调用 literature-engine 的 paper-overview skill。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-overview → hypothesis-formation-paper-overview;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-paper-search
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-paper-search [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Import SOP(来自 literature-engine):中深度文献搜索。 多源搜索 + AI 摘要报告 + 相关性排序。直接调用 literature-engine 的 paper-search skill。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-search → hypothesis-formation-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-search)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-paper-research
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-paper-research [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Import SOP(来自 literature-engine):深度文献研究。 原始全文 + PDF 问答(Keshav 三遍阅读法)。直接调用 literature-engine 的 paper-research skill。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-research → hypothesis-formation-paper-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-research)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-web-search
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-web-search [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Import SOP(来自 web-browsing):快速 web 扫描。 发现 URL + snippet,初步信息收集。直接调用 web-browsing 的 web-search skill。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-search → hypothesis-formation-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: hypothesis-formation-web-research
nodes.description:
hypothesis-formation-web-research [sop] · hypothesis-formation
Import SOP(来自 web-browsing):深度 web 研究。 全文抓取 + 内容分析 + 多来源综合。直接调用 web-browsing 的 web-research skill。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-research → hypothesis-formation-web-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-research)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
根 ENTRY 入口 — Research Knowledge Acquisition Engine。按 research intent 路由到 5 个 campaign(literature-survey / patent-mining / benchmark-archaeology / meta-analysis / baseline-establishment),并可串行/并行/条件式编排多 campaign。Pre-condition: north-star-crystallization 必须先完成。 层级靠 ENTRY.md 散文路由表声明(无 type/layer frontmatter,据 ENTRY 推断为根 campaign)。

nodes.name: literature-survey
nodes.description:
literature-survey [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
文献调研 campaign — 5 个 paradigm 策略(scoping / systematic / deep / narrative / snowball)。按 research intent 选 paradigm,带定量 budget enforcement,search→screen→read→categorize→gap→synthesis。orchestrates 5 strategy + 3 tactic + 11 subagent SOP + 5 import SOP。

nodes.name: patent-mining
nodes.description:
patent-mining [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
专利分析 campaign — 5 个策略(landscape-survey / prior-art-search / white-space-analysis / competitive-intelligence / claim-analysis)。映射专利景观、追溯 prior art、识别白空间、画像竞品组合、分解权利要求 scope。orchestrates 5 strategy + 3 tactic + 10 SOP(+ 共享 saturation-detection)。

nodes.name: benchmark-archaeology
nodes.description:
benchmark-archaeology [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
评估方法考古 campaign — 把 benchmark 当历史文物做取证。5 策略(benchmark-audit / saturation-analysis / validity-probing / coverage-mapping / protocol-forensics)揭示 construct validity 问题、饱和、数据污染、协议漂移。orchestrates 5 strategy + 3 tactic + 9 SOP(+ 共享 saturation-detection)。

nodes.name: meta-analysis
nodes.description:
meta-analysis [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
跨研究统计综合 campaign — 多研究证据综合的系统收集 + 方法学规划,止于 protocol design,不做计算。5 策略(pairwise / network / cumulative / heterogeneity / bias)。orchestrates 5 strategy + 3 tactic + 10 SOP,输出 PRISMA 合规 protocol。

nodes.name: baseline-establishment
nodes.description:
baseline-establishment [campaign] · knowledge-acquisition
SOTA 性能基线 campaign — 系统收集/标准化/分析跨方法性能数据。5 策略(method-inventory / performance-extraction / condition-standardization / discrepancy-analysis / progress-quantification)。orchestrates 5 strategy + 3 tactic + 10 SOP,产出标准化对比表/进展曲线/headroom 分析。

nodes.name: scoping-survey
nodes.description:
scoping-survey [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
广而浅 landscape 映射策略。breadth>depth:100 paper-overview / 20 paper-search / 0 paper-research。HARD-GATE:各 SOP 行 ≥90% 才退出。层级据 used-by:literature-survey 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: systematic-survey
nodes.description:
systematic-survey [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
深而穷尽 PRISMA 式系统综述。资源最重(30 paper-research)。multi-stage screening + citation chaining + quality assessment + 结构化抽取。HARD-GATE ≥90%。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: deep-survey
nodes.description:
deep-survey [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
精准深读 单一子问题。50% deep-read 率(20/40),抽方程/超参/具体 claim。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: narrative-review
nodes.description:
narrative-review [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
理论驱动叙事 综述,主观选证支撑 thesis。高 web-research(15 页:博客/观点/业界)。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: snowball
nodes.description:
snowball [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
种子论文 + 前后向引用追溯 lineage。67% deep-read 率。最小 web-search。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: prisma-screening
nodes.description:
prisma-screening [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
PRISMA 四阶段筛选 tactic:identification→title/abstract→full-text→inclusion,每阶段记 in/out + 排除理由。

nodes.name: citation-chaining
nodes.description:
citation-chaining [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
前后向引用追踪 tactic(ss_references / ss_citations),交替正反向直到 saturation。三 campaign 共享(lit/patent/baseline)。

nodes.name: narrative-framing
nodes.description:
narrative-framing [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
先立框架再填证据 tactic(theme→argument→evidence→counter-evidence→synthesis)。最 intellectual 的 tactic。

nodes.name: survey-synthesis
nodes.description:
survey-synthesis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
终步 SOP:把全部累积证据织成结构化综述输出(subagent,处理 50+ 篇笔记)。5 策略共用 final step。

nodes.name: define-search-protocol
nodes.description:
define-search-protocol [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
形式化 query + 纳入/排除标准,产出可复现搜索 protocol(subagent)。

nodes.name: categorize-papers
nodes.description:
categorize-papers [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
按 theme/method/timeline 聚类论文(subagent)。三 campaign 共享(lit/meta/baseline)。

nodes.name: extract-data
nodes.description:
extract-data [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
从深读论文抽结构化对比表(method×dataset×metric×results×limitations)(subagent)。

nodes.name: quality-assessment
nodes.description:
quality-assessment [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
用既定框架给论文方法学严谨度打分(subagent)。

nodes.name: seed-selection
nodes.description:
seed-selection [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
校验并排序 snowball 的起始种子论文(引用量/recency/网络位置)(subagent)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-saturation-detection
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-saturation-detection [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
判断继续/近饱和/已饱和(最新批 vs 既有 corpus)(subagent)。三 campaign 共享(lit/patent/benchmark)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 saturation-detection → knowledge-acquisition-saturation-detection(裸名 saturation-detection 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: taxonomy-mapping
nodes.description:
taxonomy-mapping [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
从论文集构建分层 field map(parent/child + 计数 + maturity)(subagent)。

nodes.name: prisma-flowchart
nodes.description:
prisma-flowchart [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
生成 PRISMA 合规 flow 数据(各阶段计数 + 排除理由)(subagent)。

nodes.name: thematic-coding
nodes.description:
thematic-coding [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
用质性编码法识别跨论文复现主题,产 codebook(subagent)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-gap-identification
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-gap-identification [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
识别文献未覆盖之处(缺失方法/未测组合/未解矛盾),对 negative space 推理(subagent)。三 campaign 共享(lit/benchmark/baseline)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 gap-identification → knowledge-acquisition-gap-identification(裸名 gap-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-web-search
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-web-search [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
import SOP:快速 web 扫描(snippets only,不下结论)。源自 web-browsing/web-search(跨 repo 指针,非顶点)。5 campaign 共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-search → knowledge-acquisition-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-web-research
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-web-research [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
import SOP:全页 web 精读(apify 抓全页,非学术视角)。源自 web-browsing/web-research(跨 repo)。共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 web-research → knowledge-acquisition-web-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-research)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-paper-overview
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-paper-overview [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
import SOP:摘要级论文扫描。源自 literature-engine/literature-overview(跨 repo)。共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-overview → knowledge-acquisition-paper-overview;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-paper-search
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-paper-search [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
import SOP:AI 摘要级论文阅读(get_paper_content)。源自 literature-engine/literature-search(跨 repo)。共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-search → knowledge-acquisition-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-search)。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-paper-research
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-paper-research [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
import SOP:全文深读(fullText:true,抽方程/超参)。源自 literature-engine/literature-research(跨 repo)。共享。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 paper-research → knowledge-acquisition-paper-research;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-research)。

nodes.name: landscape-survey
nodes.description:
landscape-survey [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
专利景观全扫 策略:assignee 排名 + IPC/CPC 分类 + filing 趋势。Budget 200 families / 0 claim parse / 80 web search。HARD-GATE:families 80% + web 80%。execution:strategy。

nodes.name: prior-art-search
nodes.description:
prior-art-search [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
prior art 搜索 评估单一发明 novelty(FTO/可专利性)。Budget 80 families / 20 claim parse / 50 web。HARD-GATE 80%。execution:strategy。

nodes.name: white-space-analysis
nodes.description:
white-space-analysis [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
白空间分析:feature cross-matrix 找无专利覆盖的技术组合。Budget 150 families / 10 claim / 60 web。HARD-GATE。execution:strategy。

nodes.name: competitive-intelligence
nodes.description:
competitive-intelligence [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
竞品 IP 组合画像 + 策略推断。Budget 120 families / 15 claim / 40 web。HARD-GATE 80%。execution:strategy。

nodes.name: claim-analysis
nodes.description:
claim-analysis [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
权利要求 scope 深析:分解 independent/dependent claim,评估保护广度/脆弱性。Budget 30 families / 30 claim / 20 web。HARD-GATE。execution:strategy。

nodes.name: patent-family-tracing
nodes.description:
patent-family-tracing [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
专利 family 前后向引用 + priority 链追溯 tactic,迭代到 saturation(<5% new/iter)。

nodes.name: classification-navigation
nodes.description:
classification-navigation [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
IPC/CPC 分类层级 drill-down + 横向扩展 tactic,发现 taxonomy 邻域专利。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-claim-decomposition
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-claim-decomposition [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
权利要求结构分解 tactic:independent/dependent 识别 + element 抽取 + feature→技术域映射。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 claim-decomposition → knowledge-acquisition-claim-decomposition(裸名 claim-decomposition 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: patent-query-formulation
nodes.description:
patent-query-formulation [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
构造 keyword+IPC/CPC+assignee 组合检索策略,最大化 recall(subagent)。

nodes.name: patent-categorization
nodes.description:
patent-categorization [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
按技术子域/应用场景/价值链位置分类专利(subagent)。

nodes.name: assignee-normalization
nodes.description:
assignee-normalization [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
跨专利局标准化 assignee 名 + 识别母子/收购公司组(subagent)。

nodes.name: citation-network-analysis
nodes.description:
citation-network-analysis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
构建专利引用网络 + main path / PageRank / cluster 分析(subagent)。

nodes.name: trend-analysis
nodes.description:
trend-analysis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
filing 量时间序列 + 技术生命周期 + S-curve 拟合(subagent)。

nodes.name: white-space-mapping
nodes.description:
white-space-mapping [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
feature cross-matrix 构建 + 空白区识别(unprotected 组合)(subagent)。

nodes.name: claim-parsing
nodes.description:
claim-parsing [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
权利要求语法解析:independent/dependent 关系 + element 抽取(subagent)。

nodes.name: legal-status-assessment
nodes.description:
legal-status-assessment [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
判定专利法律状态(active/expired/pending/lapsed/revoked)(subagent)。

nodes.name: quality-scoring
nodes.description:
quality-scoring [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
多维专利质量评估(forward cite/family size/claim count/地理广度)(subagent)。

nodes.name: patent-synthesis
nodes.description:
patent-synthesis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
终步 SOP:综合全部上游分析产出结构化专利情报报告(subagent)。

nodes.name: benchmark-audit
nodes.description:
benchmark-audit [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
BetterBench 46-criterion 质量审计 策略。Budget 5 benchmark / 30 paper / 40 web。HARD-GATE 80%。层级据 used-by:benchmark-archaeology 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: saturation-analysis
nodes.description:
saturation-analysis [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
分数轨迹 + 饱和/天花板检测 策略。Budget 15 benchmark / 50 paper / 60 web。HARD-GATE 80%。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: validity-probing
nodes.description:
validity-probing [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
construct validity 挑战:benchmark 真测了 claimed capability 吗?查 shortcut/artifact/混淆。Budget 3 benchmark / 40 paper / 30 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: coverage-mapping
nodes.description:
coverage-mapping [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
评估覆盖映射:capability taxonomy + benchmark 覆盖标注,找白空间/冗余。Budget 20 benchmark / 30 paper / 50 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: protocol-forensics
nodes.description:
protocol-forensics [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
评估协议取证:同一 benchmark 跨论文实现差异 → 量化协议方差 vs 真实改进。Budget 5 benchmark / 60 paper / 30 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: score-trajectory-analysis
nodes.description:
score-trajectory-analysis [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
历史分数采集 + 饱和曲线拟合 + 拐点检测 tactic(logistic/exp/linear/piecewise),分类 pre/approaching/saturated/supersaturated。

nodes.name: artifact-detection
nodes.description:
artifact-detection [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
annotation artifact / shortcut 探测 tactic:partial-input baseline / contrast set / format 敏感性 → severity 分级。

nodes.name: evaluation-protocol-comparison
nodes.description:
evaluation-protocol-comparison [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
同 benchmark 跨论文协议对比 tactic:5 类协议参数 → difference matrix + variance 等级 + p-hacking flag。

nodes.name: knowledge-acquisition-benchmark-inventory
nodes.description:
knowledge-acquisition-benchmark-inventory [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
识别并 catalog 目标域全部相关 benchmark(name/year/size/metric/SOTA/status)(subagent)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 benchmark-inventory → knowledge-acquisition-benchmark-inventory(裸名 benchmark-inventory 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: metric-decomposition
nodes.description:
metric-decomposition [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
把 composite metric 分解为 constituent signal,析 ceiling/polarity/Goodhart 病理(subagent)。

nodes.name: contamination-audit
nodes.description:
contamination-audit [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
检测 train-test 泄漏 + memorization artifact(temporal/disclosure/pattern)(subagent)。

nodes.name: construct-validity-assessment
nodes.description:
construct-validity-assessment [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
用 psychometric 框架评 benchmark 是否真测 claimed capability(content/convergent/discriminant validity)(subagent)。

nodes.name: documentation-audit
nodes.description:
documentation-audit [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
对照 BetterBench/Datasheets 标准评文档完整度(subagent)。

nodes.name: capability-taxonomy-mapping
nodes.description:
capability-taxonomy-mapping [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
构建 capability taxonomy 并映射 benchmark 覆盖,找白空间/冗余(subagent)。

nodes.name: leaderboard-dynamics-analysis
nodes.description:
leaderboard-dynamics-analysis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
析 leaderboard 分数分布/压缩/选择性报告/异常(subagent)。

nodes.name: protocol-element-extraction
nodes.description:
protocol-element-extraction [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
从论文抽 5 类评估协议参数,标注 ambiguous/unstated(subagent)。

nodes.name: benchmark-synthesis
nodes.description:
benchmark-synthesis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
终步 SOP:聚合全部分析维度产出结构化审计报告 + 优先级建议(subagent)。

nodes.name: pairwise-synthesis
nodes.description:
pairwise-synthesis [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
两方法配对 meta-analysis protocol 策略。Budget 30 study / 30 effect size / 40 web。HARD-GATE 80% floor。层级据 used-by:meta-analysis 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: network-comparison
nodes.description:
network-comparison [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
N≥3 方法网络 meta-analysis (NMA) protocol,含 indirect evidence。Budget 50 study / 80 effect size / 60 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: cumulative-tracking
nodes.description:
cumulative-tracking [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
累积 meta-analysis protocol:按时间逐篇加入,看证据何时收敛。Budget 40 study / 40 effect size / 30 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: heterogeneity-investigation
nodes.description:
heterogeneity-investigation [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
异质性调查 protocol:为何同问题研究结论不同(subgroup/meta-regression/outlier)。Budget 30 study / 30 effect size / 50 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: bias-detection
nodes.description:
bias-detection [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
证据体系偏倚评估 protocol:publication/reporting/time-lag/citation/language bias + funnel/Egger/trim-fill。Budget 40 study / 40 effect size / 40 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: effect-size-extraction
nodes.description:
effect-size-extraction [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
效应量 + 条件系统抽取 tactic(5 stage:定位→data point→计算规划→条件记录→质量标注)。

nodes.name: quality-assessment-protocol
nodes.description:
quality-assessment-protocol [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
方法学质量 + 偏倚风险评估 tactic:按设计选工具(RoB2/ROBINS-I/QUADAS-2/PROBAST/NOS)逐研究评。

nodes.name: evidence-synthesis-planning
nodes.description:
evidence-synthesis-planning [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
统计综合方案规划 tactic:effect size 型 + fixed/random 模型 + 异质性策略 + 敏感性 + PRISMA 报告。

nodes.name: pico-formulation
nodes.description:
pico-formulation [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
从研究问题构建 PICO/PECO 框架(meta-analysis 首步)(subagent)。

nodes.name: inclusion-criteria-design
nodes.description:
inclusion-criteria-design [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
定义纳入/排除标准 + borderline 决策规则(subagent)。

nodes.name: effect-size-planning
nodes.description:
effect-size-planning [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
确定 effect size 度量(SMD/OR/RR/MD/HR/z)+ 计算/转换公式(subagent)。

nodes.name: data-extraction-form
nodes.description:
data-extraction-form [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
设计结构化数据抽取表(字段定义 + coding 指南)(subagent)。

nodes.name: risk-of-bias-assessment
nodes.description:
risk-of-bias-assessment [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
用 RoB2/ROBINS-I/QUADAS-2/PROBAST/NOS 做单研究偏倚评估(subagent)。

nodes.name: heterogeneity-source-analysis
nodes.description:
heterogeneity-source-analysis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
识别/分类异质性来源(clinical/methodological/statistical)+ 调查优先级(subagent)。

nodes.name: publication-bias-assessment
nodes.description:
publication-bias-assessment [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
规划 funnel/Egger/trim-fill/p-curve/selection model(subagent)。

nodes.name: sensitivity-analysis-design
nodes.description:
sensitivity-analysis-design [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
设计 leave-one-out / 影响诊断 / subgroup / 替代模型 robustness 检查(subagent)。

nodes.name: evidence-network-construction
nodes.description:
evidence-network-construction [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
为 NMA 构建证据网络图(node/edge/geometry/connectivity/transitivity)(subagent)。

nodes.name: meta-analysis-synthesis
nodes.description:
meta-analysis-synthesis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
终步 SOP:把全部规划输出装配成 PRISMA-P 合规、可 PROSPERO 注册的 protocol(subagent)。

nodes.name: method-inventory
nodes.description:
method-inventory [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
方法全清点 策略:leaderboard+citation chain+关键词搜尽任务全部方法。Budget 50 method / 60 web。HARD-GATE methods≥40(80%)。层级据 used-by:baseline-establishment 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: performance-extraction
nodes.description:
performance-extraction [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
性能数据抽取:(Task,Dataset,Metric,Score,Conditions) 元组带 provenance。Budget 30 method / 150 data point / 40 web。HARD-GATE data≥120。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: condition-standardization
nodes.description:
condition-standardization [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
评估条件标准化:识别条件差异 + normalization scheme → fair-comparison baseline。Budget 20 method / 60 data point / 30 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: discrepancy-analysis
nodes.description:
discrepancy-analysis [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
报告分数 vs 可复现分数差异:flag 可疑性能宣称 + 评 baseline 可靠性。Budget 15 method / 45 data point / 30 web。HARD-GATE。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: progress-quantification
nodes.description:
progress-quantification [strategy] · knowledge-acquisition
进展曲线 + headroom 量化:拟合曲线、拐点(paradigm shift)、ceiling 估计。Budget 30 method / 100 data point / 40 web。HARD-GATE data≥80。层级据 used-by 推断(无 execution 字段)。

nodes.name: leaderboard-harvesting
nodes.description:
leaderboard-harvesting [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
leaderboard/论文性能数据采集 tactic(Platform scan→Paper extraction→Cross-validation→Dedup/merge),provenance 追踪。

nodes.name: condition-normalization
nodes.description:
condition-normalization [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
跨论文实验条件对比 + 标准化 tactic:条件抽取→difference matrix→normalization scheme→fair comparison。

nodes.name: progress-curve-construction
nodes.description:
progress-curve-construction [tactic] · knowledge-acquisition
性能-时间进展曲线构建 tactic:时序排列→曲线拟合→拐点检测→headroom 估计。

nodes.name: method-discovery
nodes.description:
method-discovery [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
经文献/leaderboard/citation chain 多管齐下发现任务全部方法(subagent)。

nodes.name: score-extraction
nodes.description:
score-extraction [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
从单篇论文 results/表/图抽 (Task,Dataset,Metric,Score,Conditions) 元组(subagent)。

nodes.name: condition-cataloging
nodes.description:
condition-cataloging [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
记录单方法的全部实验条件(data/compute/hyperparam/eval/reproducibility)(subagent)。

nodes.name: reproducibility-checklist-audit
nodes.description:
reproducibility-checklist-audit [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
对照 ML Reproducibility Checklist(NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR)评论文完整度(subagent)。

nodes.name: performance-table-assembly
nodes.description:
performance-table-assembly [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
把多篇抽取分数装配成统一对比表(名归一/metric 对齐/CI 传播/fairness 标注)(subagent)。

nodes.name: compute-normalization
nodes.description:
compute-normalization [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
按 compute budget 归一(Pareto 前沿 + 效率排名 + 预算建议)(subagent)。

nodes.name: discrepancy-identification
nodes.description:
discrepancy-identification [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
比同方法跨源分数,flag 显著偏差 + likely cause(subagent)。

nodes.name: headroom-estimation
nodes.description:
headroom-estimation [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
估 theoretical/human/practical ceiling 与当前 SOTA 的 gap(subagent)。

nodes.name: progress-curve-fitting
nodes.description:
progress-curve-fitting [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
对历史 SOTA 拟合参数曲线 + 拐点 + 外推(subagent)。

nodes.name: baseline-synthesis
nodes.description:
baseline-synthesis [sop] · knowledge-acquisition
终步 SOP:把 inventory/性能表/条件/差异/进展曲线综合为可执行 baseline 报告(subagent)。

nodes.name: ontology-building
nodes.description:
ontology-building [campaign] · knowledge-structuring
本体构建 campaign。 为一个研究域系统化建本体:按 strategy 序列 domain-scoping → concept-extraction → relation-typing → taxonomy-validation → ontology-refinement 编排,每条 strategy 后强制 knowledge-compilation 落盘(HARD-GATE: context-init / context-checkpoint / knowledge-compilation)。produces 一个 wiki vault 里的 concept hierarchy。

nodes.name: causal-modeling
nodes.description:
causal-modeling [campaign] · knowledge-structuring
因果建模 campaign。 编排 5 条 strategy variable-identification → mechanism-mapping → evidence-collection → intervention-analysis → model-validation 构建有向因果图;每条 strategy 后 knowledge-compilation 落盘。核心戒律:correlation≠causation,每条 mechanism edge 必须有机制论证。

nodes.name: dimensional-analysis
nodes.description:
dimensional-analysis [campaign] · knowledge-structuring
维度/设计空间分析 campaign。 编排 3 条 strategy dimension-discovery → combination-mapping → gap-prioritization,发现变化轴、枚举组合、定位未探索空白(novel opportunities)。每条 strategy 后 knowledge-compilation 落盘。

nodes.name: argument-mapping
nodes.description:
argument-mapping [campaign] · knowledge-structuring
论证结构映射 campaign。 编排 3 条 strategy claim-extraction → evidence-linking-arg → argument-synthesis,抽 claim、挂证据、评强度、综合立场。每条 strategy 后 knowledge-compilation 落盘。synthesis≠averaging。

nodes.name: domain-scoping
nodes.description:
domain-scoping [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
ontology strategy①。 定本体边界 + seed concepts + 分类 topic 规模。编排 tactic concept-decomposition / hierarchy-construction,直调 sop seed-concept-search。HARD-GATE: 80% budget 才能退出 + 打印 state ledger。

nodes.name: concept-extraction
nodes.description:
concept-extraction [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
ontology strategy②。 从 source 挖 concept(precision>recall),编排 concept-decomposition / consistency-checking,直调 source-gathering 取材。HARD-GATE: 80% budget + ledger。

nodes.name: relation-typing
nodes.description:
relation-typing [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
ontology strategy③。 识别并 type 概念间的边,要求每个 concept 至少连 2 个其它。编排 hierarchy-construction / consistency-checking,直调 edge-batch-creation。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: taxonomy-validation
nodes.description:
taxonomy-validation [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
ontology strategy④ (quality gate)。 校验结构完整性(环 / orphan / 类型违例)。编排 consistency-checking / hierarchy-construction,直调 gap-detection / hierarchy-visualization / ontology-export。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: ontology-refinement
nodes.description:
ontology-refinement [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
ontology strategy⑤。 迭代精修:merge 近重复、补 gap、更新 confidence、剪枝。编排 concept-decomposition / consistency-checking,直调 confidence-update / ontology-export / gap-detection 等。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-variable-identification
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-variable-identification [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
causal strategy①。 在画任何因果边之前先穷尽并 type 所有变量、flag confounder。编排 tactic counterfactual-reasoning / evidence-weighing,直调 sop variable-page-creation。HARD-GATE: 80% budget + ledger。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 variable-identification → knowledge-structuring-variable-identification(裸名 variable-identification 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: mechanism-mapping
nodes.description:
mechanism-mapping [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
causal strategy②。 构建有向因果图,每条 mechanism edge = 带 pathway+falsifier+citation 的假设。编排 counterfactual-reasoning / evidence-weighing / feedback-loop-detection,直调 mechanism-edge-creation。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: evidence-collection
nodes.description:
evidence-collection [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
causal strategy③。 挂证据页,造 supported_by / contradicts 边,对抗式找反证。编排 evidence-weighing / counterfactual-reasoning / feedback-loop-detection,直调 evidence-linking。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: intervention-analysis
nodes.description:
intervention-analysis [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
causal strategy④。 do-calculus:切断入边、前向追踪、预测方向性结果。编排 counterfactual-reasoning / feedback-loop-detection / evidence-weighing,直调 intervention-page-creation。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: model-validation
nodes.description:
model-validation [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
causal strategy⑤ (final quality gate)。 以 skeptic 立场审环、解矛盾、重标定并传播 confidence。编排 feedback-loop-detection / evidence-weighing / counterfactual-reasoning,直调 model-gap-detection / validation-report。HARD-GATE: 80% budget。

nodes.name: dimension-discovery
nodes.description:
dimension-discovery [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional strategy①。 找设计空间里相互独立的根本变化轴。编排 tactic axis-extraction / matrix-generation。HARD-GATE: 80% budget + state ledger。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-combination-mapping
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-combination-mapping [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional strategy②。 跨维度枚举组合,标 occupied / empty / impossible。编排 matrix-generation / axis-extraction。HARD-GATE: 80% budget + ledger。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 combination-mapping → knowledge-structuring-combination-mapping(裸名 combination-mapping 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-gap-prioritization
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-gap-prioritization [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional strategy③。 按 novelty / feasibility / impact 给空白格排序。编排 matrix-generation / axis-extraction。HARD-GATE: 80% budget + ledger。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 gap-prioritization → knowledge-structuring-gap-prioritization(裸名 gap-prioritization 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: claim-extraction
nodes.description:
claim-extraction [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
argument strategy①。 从 source 抽 claim、拆复合句、分类、建 claim 页。编排 tactic claim-decomposition,直列 sop claim-page-creation / rebuttal-documentation。HARD-GATE: ledger + 80% budget + adversarial completeness probe。

nodes.name: evidence-linking-arg
nodes.description:
evidence-linking-arg [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
argument strategy②。 以 typed edge 把证据挂到 claim、评质量、找矛盾/gap。编排 strength-assessment,直列 evidence-attachment / strength-scoring。HARD-GATE: ledger + 80% budget + confirmation-bias self-check。

nodes.name: argument-synthesis
nodes.description:
argument-synthesis [strategy] · knowledge-structuring
argument strategy③。 聚合证据、解矛盾、产出 synthesis(哪些 claim 经得起 scrutiny)。编排 claim-decomposition / strength-assessment,直列 argument-visualization / synthesis-report。HARD-GATE: ledger + 80% budget。

nodes.name: knowledge-compilation
nodes.description:
knowledge-compilation [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault tactic (核心落盘)。 把研究发现编译进 vault 页面;每条 strategy 结束后被 campaign 强制调用。编排 sop wiki-search / wiki-ingest-source / wiki-compile-page / wiki-add-edge / wiki-lint-fix / wiki-edge-audit。HARD-GATE: 每次调用 ≥3 page operations,否则 accumulate and defer。

nodes.name: vault-maintenance
nodes.description:
vault-maintenance [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault tactic (健康维护)。 vault 熵积累到一定程度时清理:lint / orphan 重连 / merge / confidence 更新。编排 sop wiki-lint-fix / wiki-search / wiki-graph-query / wiki-add-edge / wiki-edge-audit。HARD-GATE: 每次调用 ≥1 issue resolved。

nodes.name: concept-decomposition
nodes.description:
concept-decomposition [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
ontology tactic。 把复合/过宽概念拆成原子子概念。编排 sop concept-page-creation / edge-batch-creation / alias-resolution(+域外 wiki-search)。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥2 child concepts,否则报 atomic 并退出。

nodes.name: hierarchy-construction
nodes.description:
hierarchy-construction [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
ontology tactic。 用 component_of/instance_of 建无环、可传递、depth≤5 的层级。编排 sop edge-batch-creation / hierarchy-visualization / gap-detection,并 peer-调 consistency-checking 验环。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥3 hierarchy edges。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-consistency-checking
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-consistency-checking [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
ontology tactic。 查矛盾/环/orphan/类型违例。编排 sop gap-detection / merge-candidates(+域外 wiki-lint-fix / wiki-graph-query)。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥1 inconsistency resolved,否则报 clean。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 consistency-checking → knowledge-structuring-consistency-checking(裸名 consistency-checking 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: counterfactual-reasoning
nodes.description:
counterfactual-reasoning [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
causal tactic (因果识别金标准)。 'if X had not occurred, would Y still happen?'。编排 sop causal-chain-query / contradiction-flagging / confidence-scoring。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥1 counterfactual 带显式机制+confidence。

nodes.name: evidence-weighing
nodes.description:
evidence-weighing [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
causal tactic。 按证据层级(RCT>observational>theoretical>anecdote)+ effect size + replication 排序。编排 sop evidence-linking / confidence-scoring / contradiction-flagging。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥2 assessments 带 strength rating。

nodes.name: feedback-loop-detection
nodes.description:
feedback-loop-detection [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
causal tactic。 找循环因果,分 reinforcing/balancing,记 delay/break point。编排 sop causal-chain-query / loop-documentation / mechanism-edge-creation。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥1 loop 分类(或显式报无)。

nodes.name: axis-extraction
nodes.description:
axis-extraction [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional tactic。 从文献系统抽变化轴(对比/trade-off/taxonomy)。编排 sop dimension-page-creation / axis-validation(+域外 wiki-search)。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥2 candidate axes 带 independence assessment。

nodes.name: matrix-generation
nodes.description:
matrix-generation [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional tactic。 跨维度生成/填充组合矩阵。编排 sop combination-enumeration / novelty-scoring / question-generation / matrix-export。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥1 matrix 且 ≥50% cell 已分类。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-claim-decomposition
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-claim-decomposition [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
argument tactic。 把复合 claim 拆成原子可证伪命题、抽隐含假设。编排 sop claim-page-creation / rebuttal-documentation。HARD-GATE: 每个复合 claim ≥2 atomic claims。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 claim-decomposition → knowledge-structuring-claim-decomposition(裸名 claim-decomposition 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: strength-assessment
nodes.description:
strength-assessment [tactic] · knowledge-structuring
argument tactic。 按证据质量/独立性/defeater 评 claim 强度并给校准分。编排 sop strength-scoring / evidence-attachment。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥3 claims 评分。

nodes.name: wiki-search
nodes.description:
wiki-search [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 包 vault_search 做 BM25 全文检索,建页前去重(score>5.0 视为强匹配)。HARD-GATE: query 非空且含实义词。

nodes.name: wiki-graph-query
nodes.description:
wiki-graph-query [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 包 vault_query_graph,从某节点 BFS 探邻域、找 orphan / 缺连。HARD-GATE: node 文件须存在。

nodes.name: wiki-add-edge
nodes.description:
wiki-add-edge [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 包 vault_add_edge,在两页间建 10 类 typed edge 之一并补 inline wikilink。HARD-GATE: 两端文件都须存在、不连不存在的页。

nodes.name: wiki-ingest-source
nodes.description:
wiki-ingest-source [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 写 immutable source 页(原文 verbatim),再 vault_index。HARD-GATE: title score>8.0 即报重复并 abort;source 永不再编辑。

nodes.name: wiki-compile-page
nodes.description:
wiki-compile-page [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 创建/更新 synthesized wiki 页 + edges + inline wikilink + 增量 index。HARD-GATE: 先判 CREATE(search 确认 score<5.0)vs UPDATE(先读原页),绝不盲目覆盖。

nodes.name: wiki-lint-fix
nodes.description:
wiki-lint-fix [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 包 vault_lint 批量校验,先 report 后可 auto-fix(仅 dup edge / stale index)。HARD-GATE: 必先 report 模式、呈摘要后才 fix。

nodes.name: wiki-edge-audit
nodes.description:
wiki-edge-audit [sop] · knowledge-structuring
wiki-vault sop。 包 vault_edge_audit,扫所有 edge、补缺失的 [[dir/slug]] wikilink。HARD-GATE: 不可跳过 fix,重审须 missing_count==0。

nodes.name: seed-concept-search
nodes.description:
seed-concept-search [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 在 vault + web 找 seed concept。HARD-GATE: ≥3 candidates 带 source attribution。

nodes.name: source-gathering
nodes.description:
source-gathering [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 用 web/paper 搜索找源,逐条转交 wiki-ingest-source 落 source 页。HARD-GATE: 每次 ≥2 source pages。

nodes.name: concept-page-creation
nodes.description:
concept-page-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 建新 concept 页带 frontmatter + ≥1 edge。HARD-GATE: 不准造 orphan,至少 1 条边。

nodes.name: alias-resolution
nodes.description:
alias-resolution [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 检测同概念异名页并 merge 到 canonical。HARD-GATE: merge 前须确认确为同一概念。

nodes.name: edge-batch-creation
nodes.description:
edge-batch-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 批量建边 + inline wikilink。HARD-GATE: 整批先校验再写。

nodes.name: hierarchy-visualization
nodes.description:
hierarchy-visualization [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 经 graph query 取层级,出缩进树。HARD-GATE: ≥top-3 roots 都查到。

nodes.name: gap-detection
nodes.description:
gap-detection [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 找 orphan / 细枝 / 断簇,给可执行修补建议。HARD-GATE: 分析完整 orphan 列表。

nodes.name: merge-candidates
nodes.description:
merge-candidates [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 标近重复 concept(score>7.0)。HARD-GATE: 扫 ≥10 concepts(或全部)。

nodes.name: confidence-update
nodes.description:
confidence-update [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 据新证据更新 confidence 分。HARD-GATE: 每次改动都引具体 evidence。

nodes.name: ontology-export
nodes.description:
ontology-export [sop] · knowledge-structuring
ontology sop。 产出可读 ontology summary。HARD-GATE: 含定量计数 + 定性层级。

nodes.name: variable-page-creation
nodes.description:
variable-page-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 写 concepts/.md 描述一个可测变量 + ≥1 图边。HARD-GATE: 须有清晰 operational definition。

nodes.name: mechanism-edge-creation
nodes.description:
mechanism-edge-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 建因果边(derived_from/component_of),weight=机制强度(1.0/0.5/0.2)。HARD-GATE: 每条边须陈述 HOW。

nodes.name: evidence-linking
nodes.description:
evidence-linking [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 从 evidence 页向具体 claim 建 supported_by / contradicts 边。HARD-GATE: 须挂到 claim 而非 topic。

nodes.name: contradiction-flagging
nodes.description:
contradiction-flagging [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 检测同时存在的 support+contradict 证据,建 contradicts 边并记入 question 页。HARD-GATE: 必须记录、不可忽略。

nodes.name: confidence-scoring
nodes.description:
confidence-scoring [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 net confidence = support_w/(support_w+contradict_w) ± 机制调整,写入 frontmatter。HARD-GATE: 0.0–1.0 且引证据。

nodes.name: intervention-page-creation
nodes.description:
intervention-page-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 写 claims/.md(目标变量、操纵、预测/观测效应)+ addresses/derived_from 边。HARD-GATE: 须指明 target / direction / predicted effects。

nodes.name: loop-documentation
nodes.description:
loop-documentation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 写 relations/.md 记反馈环(类型、变量、delay、break point)。HARD-GATE: 分类 reinforcing/balancing 并列全环变量。

nodes.name: model-gap-detection
nodes.description:
model-gap-detection [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 经 vault_graph_stats 找 orphan(度0)+ 弱链(<0.3)→ 可执行 gap。HARD-GATE: orphan 与 weak link 都查并给建议。

nodes.name: causal-chain-query
nodes.description:
causal-chain-query [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 经 vault_query_graph(depth3, out)重建有序因果链、分支、环。HARD-GATE: 报含中间节点的完整链。

nodes.name: validation-report
nodes.description:
validation-report [sop] · knowledge-structuring
causal sop。 vault_graph_stats + vault_lint → 写 topics/causal-model-report.md。HARD-GATE: 含变量/边/confidence 分布/未决矛盾/结构问题。

nodes.name: dimension-page-creation
nodes.description:
dimension-page-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 建 concepts/.md 维度页带 values + edges。HARD-GATE: ≥2 distinct values + 清晰 axis 定义。

nodes.name: axis-validation
nodes.description:
axis-validation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 两两测维度独立性,合并共变者、删单值者。HARD-GATE: 对所有 candidate 做 pairwise independence test。

nodes.name: combination-enumeration
nodes.description:
combination-enumeration [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 笛卡尔积枚举维度取值并逐格分类。HARD-GATE: 枚举全部组合而非抽样。

nodes.name: knowledge-structuring-novelty-scoring
nodes.description:
knowledge-structuring-novelty-scoring [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 给空白格按 novelty(距离/可行/影响)打 0-10 分。HARD-GATE: 每分附显式 reasoning。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 novelty-scoring → knowledge-structuring-novelty-scoring(裸名 novelty-scoring 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: question-generation
nodes.description:
question-generation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 从优先 gap 提可答研究问题,写 questions/.md。HARD-GATE: 问题须具体可答、不泛。

nodes.name: matrix-export
nodes.description:
matrix-export [sop] · knowledge-structuring
dimensional sop。 把矩阵导出到 topics/dimensional-matrix.md 带 summary stats。HARD-GATE: 自包含、脱离 vault 也可读。

nodes.name: claim-page-creation
nodes.description:
claim-page-creation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 写原子命题 claim 页带 type/confidence/source + derived_from 边。HARD-GATE: claim 须原子(无 and/but/because)。

nodes.name: rebuttal-documentation
nodes.description:
rebuttal-documentation [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 写 counter-claim 页带 contradicts + derived_from 边。HARD-GATE: 须点名被反驳 claim + 矛盾类型。

nodes.name: evidence-attachment
nodes.description:
evidence-attachment [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 用 typed edge(supported_by/contradicts/related_to)把证据挂到 claim,带质量元数据。HARD-GATE: 须标 quality + directness。

nodes.name: strength-scoring
nodes.description:
strength-scoring [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 据图中证据用 rubric 给 claim 打 0-10 校准强度分,写入 frontmatter。HARD-GATE: 须给显式 reasoning。

nodes.name: argument-visualization
nodes.description:
argument-visualization [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 查图渲 mermaid 论证图(按强度着色)写入 wiki 页。HARD-GATE: ≥3 claims + relationships。

nodes.name: synthesis-report
nodes.description:
synthesis-report [sop] · knowledge-structuring
argument sop。 把所有 claim 分类 survived/contested/undermined/gaps,写 synthesis 页。HARD-GATE: 全部 claim 都须分类。

nodes.name: north-star-crystallization
nodes.description:
north-star-crystallization [campaign] · north-star-crystallization
Campaign 总入口:研究意图结晶引擎。 frontmatter execution: campaign。把模糊研究意图结晶成一句 North Star + 结构化 ResearchBrief。读用户首条消息评估 information density,按路由表分流到三个 strategy:无方向→cold-start / 泛方向→warm-start / 具体题目→hot-start。是下游 knowledge-acquisition 的 pre-condition。

nodes.name: cold-start
nodes.description:
cold-start [strategy] · north-star-crystallization
Strategy:零上下文全流程。 用户完全没方向(想发顶会但不知做什么)。提供 6 个 tactic 的 war doctrine + 默认流程 actor-profiling→landscape-reconnaissance→direction-narrowing→obstacle-analysis→goal-decomposition→north-star-synthesis(参考非强制)。最大深度、所有 SOP、最大搜索量。唯一不可妥协:必须以 north-star-synthesis 收尾。

nodes.name: warm-start
nodes.description:
warm-start [strategy] · north-star-crystallization
Strategy:泛方向简化流程。 用户有大致领域无具体问题。简化 actor-profiling / 可跳过或定向化 landscape-reconnaissance,然后走 direction-narrowing→obstacle-analysis→goal-decomposition→north-star-synthesis。simplification 是默认姿态但由 CC 判断。

nodes.name: hot-start
nodes.description:
hot-start [strategy] · north-star-crystallization
Strategy:具体题目最小流程。 用户已知方向,任务是 structure 不是 explore。重简化 actor-profiling、通常跳过 landscape-reconnaissance 与 direction-narrowing,聚焦 obstacle-analysis→goal-decomposition→north-star-synthesis。

nodes.name: actor-profiling
nodes.description:
actor-profiling [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:WHO is the researcher。 编排 4 个 dialogue SOP 构建 ActorProfile(背景/资源/约束/动机)。typical flow: explore-resume(一次性)→clarify-resources→ask-constraints→ask-intentionality,可回探 ask-intentionality。

nodes.name: landscape-reconnaissance
nodes.description:
landscape-reconnaissance [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:WHAT does the field look like。 宽而浅的领域勘察,产出 FieldPanorama。编排 generate-candidate-fields→broad-web-search→landscape-synthesis→present-and-ask。HARD-GATE:broad-web-search 至少 150 条结果;迭代只扩宽度不加深度。

nodes.name: direction-narrowing
nodes.description:
direction-narrowing [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:WHERE specifically to go。 在选定领域内聚焦,产出 RankedCandidates。编排 broad-paper-search(import)+ deep-web-search(subagent)→present-candidates。HARD-GATE:≥80 篇论文、≥30 个网页全文。

nodes.name: obstacle-analysis
nodes.description:
obstacle-analysis [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:WHAT stands in the way。 识别障碍→评严重度→提缓解(证据支撑)→要用户接受,产出 ObstacleReport。编排 identify-obstacles→assess-obstacle-severity→propose-mitigations→ask-obstacle-acceptance。HARD-GATE:最多 2 轮整循环,2 轮仍不接受→回退 direction-narrowing 的 present-candidates。

nodes.name: goal-decomposition
nodes.description:
goal-decomposition [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:HOW to break it down。 KAOS 式 AND/OR 目标树并对 ActorProfile/ObstacleReport 做可行性校验,产出 GoalTree。编排 formulate-top-goal→and-or-decompose→validate-leaves→feasibility-check→ask-decomposition-validation。根本不可行→回退 direction-narrowing 或 obstacle-analysis。

nodes.name: north-star-synthesis
nodes.description:
north-star-synthesis [tactic] · north-star-crystallization
Tactic:CRYSTALLIZE the final output。 把全部上下文收敛成 North Star 一句话 + ResearchBrief,自审后呈给用户。编排 crystallize-north-star→generate-research-brief→final-validation。自审发现问题→定点回退具体 tactic/SOP 修补(非全量重跑)。

nodes.name: explore-resume
nodes.description:
explore-resume [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 execution: dialogue。一问一答梳理用户技术栈/项目/研究经历/发表/当前方向/向往领域,产出 ActorProfile.background。HARD-GATE:只执行一次,永不重跑。

nodes.name: clarify-resources
nodes.description:
clarify-resources [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 摸清算力/时间线/协作/数据/实验环境,产出 ActorProfile.resources。每项都接受 'TBD'。

nodes.name: ask-constraints
nodes.description:
ask-constraints [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 摸硬边界:目标会议/方法偏好/回避领域/导师团队要求/伦理法律,产出 ActorProfile.constraints。不限 ML/AI。

nodes.name: ask-intentionality
nodes.description:
ask-intentionality [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 i* Intentionality 深挖 WHY:动机/成功定义/风险容忍/创新偏好/独立性/时间紧迫/学习意愿。actor-profiling 里最重要的 SOP,可被 tactic 反复 re-invoke。

nodes.name: present-and-ask
nodes.description:
present-and-ask [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 把 FieldPanorama 呈给用户、收集偏好(感兴趣/排斥/未列出的方向),产出 selected 1-2 fields。桥接 landscape-synthesis 输出到用户决策。

nodes.name: present-candidates
nodes.description:
present-candidates [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 从 paper/web 搜索结果识别子方向、评活跃度/gap/skill-fit、排名呈现,产出 RankedCandidates + 用户选择。深度随 start mode 缩放(cold 宽/warm 子问题/hot 技术细节)。

nodes.name: ask-obstacle-acceptance
nodes.description:
ask-obstacle-acceptance [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 呈现障碍+严重度+缓解+工作量,问用户能否接受。不可接受→signal tactic 回退 present-candidates。search optional。

nodes.name: formulate-top-goal
nodes.description:
formulate-top-goal [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 把方向表达成正式目标句 'Achieve [what], such that [effect], under [constraints]',与用户确认后才进 decomposition。

nodes.name: ask-decomposition-validation
nodes.description:
ask-decomposition-validation [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 呈 GoalTree + validate-leaves/feasibility-check 结果,问合理性/遗漏/优先级,产出 user-confirmed GoalTree + priorities。

nodes.name: crystallize-north-star
nodes.description:
crystallize-north-star [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 融合 GoalTree 根 + 动机成一句 North Star '[verb][goal] through[path] solving[problem] ultimately[impact]'。质检:specific? ambitious? achievable?

nodes.name: final-validation
nodes.description:
final-validation [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/dialogue。 终稿质量门:placeholder 扫描/内部一致性/完整性/歧义四查;发现问题→定点回退修补;通过→呈 North Star + ResearchBrief 求确认。

nodes.name: north-star-crystallization-broad-web-search
nodes.description:
north-star-crystallization-broad-web-search [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/import。 execution: import,严格套用外部 web-browsing/web-search 协议做宽网扫描。HARD-GATE:每次 brave_web_search count=10、合计 ≥150 条结果。source 指向另一 repo(跨 repo,不在本图建点)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 broad-web-search → north-star-crystallization-broad-web-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 web-browsing/web-search)。

nodes.name: north-star-crystallization-broad-paper-search
nodes.description:
north-star-crystallization-broad-paper-search [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/import。 execution: import,严格套用外部 literature-engine/literature-overview 协议做论文 landscape 扫描。HARD-GATE:≥80 篇。source 指向另一 repo(跨 repo,不在本图建点)。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 broad-paper-search → north-star-crystallization-broad-paper-search;本 skill 是 import wrapper,同时修正其 source: 指针 (指向 literature-engine/literature-overview)。

nodes.name: generate-candidate-fields
nodes.description:
generate-candidate-fields [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 execution: subagent(经外部 subagent-spawning 派发)。据 ActorProfile 提 3-8 个候选领域,各带一行 rationale。越界探索时用 boundary+intentionality 定探索空间,不只 skills 匹配。

nodes.name: landscape-synthesis
nodes.description:
landscape-synthesis [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 把 broad-web-search 结果按 maturity/competition/entry-barrier/pub-opportunity 评估成 FieldPanorama。HARD-GATE:不能只堆 niche/拼接组合,必须含正面硬刚热门领域的雄心。

nodes.name: deep-web-search
nodes.description:
deep-web-search [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 子代理在隔离上下文里全文读 blog/技术报告/产品/行业分析(非学术视角),返回结构化摘要。HARD-GATE:≥30 个网页全文。用 subagent 而非 import 是为隔离重读防主会话上下文溢出。

nodes.name: identify-obstacles
nodes.description:
identify-obstacles [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 据 chosen direction + ActorProfile 枚举障碍(知识/资源/能力/竞争四类)。search optional(可用 web/literature 各档发现用户没提的障碍)。

nodes.name: assess-obstacle-severity
nodes.description:
assess-obstacle-severity [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 给每个障碍评 overcomability(1周/1月/6月/根本性)+时间成本+是否有 workaround。search optional。

nodes.name: propose-mitigations
nodes.description:
propose-mitigations [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 为严重障碍提具体缓解策略。HARD-GATE:search REQUIRED——必须用 import 的 web/literature 技能验证可行性,禁止 armchair theorizing,每条缓解须有 feasibility 证据。

nodes.name: and-or-decompose
nodes.description:
and-or-decompose [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 KAOS 式递归分解:AND(全须满足)/OR(任一即可),据 top goal + ActorProfile + ObstacleReport 产出 GoalTree(DAG,叶=可执行子目标)。

nodes.name: validate-leaves
nodes.description:
validate-leaves [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 质检 GoalTree 叶节点:够具体?可验证?叶集合是否完整覆盖 top goal?产出 validation report + coverage gaps。

nodes.name: feasibility-check
nodes.description:
feasibility-check [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 把 GoalTree 对 ActorProfile(能力)/ObstacleReport(已知障碍)/timeline(截止)交叉核对,逐 branch 给 feasible/stretch/infeasible;不可行→建议 OR 替代。

nodes.name: generate-research-brief
nodes.description:
generate-research-brief [sop] · north-star-crystallization
SOP/subagent。 聚合全过程产物(ActorProfile/FieldPanorama/RankedCandidates/ObstacleReport/GoalTree/North Star/references)成结构化 ResearchBrief。不直出用户,先喂 final-validation。

nodes.name: multiagent-debate
nodes.description:
multiagent-debate [campaign] · stress-test
Campaign:多智能体结构化辩论。核心问句:artifact 能否在结构化对抗辩论中存活?路由 5 strategy(critic-defender-judge/multi-perspective-panel/society-of-mind/courtroom-structured/adversarial-escalation),编排 3 tactic,产出 DebateVerdict。HARD-GATE:budget gate ±10% + 每 strategy 后 context-checkpoint。

nodes.name: red-teaming
nodes.description:
red-teaming [campaign] · stress-test
Campaign:军事/情报传统的系统化对抗攻击(UFMCS/CIA SAT/NIST AI RMF)。核心问句:系统化攻击能否找到致命缺陷?路由 5 strategy,编排 3 tactic,产出 RedTeamReport(含 resilience score 0.0-1.0)。

nodes.name: failure-anticipation
nodes.description:
failure-anticipation [campaign] · stress-test
Campaign:前瞻性失败分析(Klein pre-mortem + AIAG-VDA FMEA)。核心问句:若 artifact 失败,会怎样失败?路由 5 strategy,编排 3 tactic,产出 FailureAnticipationReport(S/O/D 评分 + H/M/L action priority)。

nodes.name: counterfactual-probing
nodes.description:
counterfactual-probing [campaign] · stress-test
Campaign:反事实推理找承重因子(Pearl SCM/Lewis possible worlds/PNS-PS)。核心问句:若关键因子不同,结论是否仍成立?路由 5 strategy,编排 3 tactic,产出 CounterfactualMap。

nodes.name: adversarial-stress-testing
nodes.description:
adversarial-stress-testing [campaign] · stress-test
Campaign:逻辑极端与边界测试(Lakatos reductio + BVA boundary analysis + Flyvbjerg critical case)。核心问句:artifact 在逻辑极限与边界条件下是否崩溃?路由 5 strategy,编排 3 tactic,产出 AdversarialStressReport。

nodes.name: critic-defender-judge
nodes.description:
critic-defender-judge [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:经典三角辩论(Irving + Toulmin)。critic 攻、defender 守、judge 裁。编排 debate-architect→critic→defender→judge→confidence-calibration 循环;tactics: dialectical-escalation + evidence-tournament。

nodes.name: multi-perspective-panel
nodes.description:
multi-perspective-panel [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:多利益相关方评审团。多元专家视角并行评估后结构化审议。编排 debate-architect 选视角→perspective-critic×N→divergence-detection→confidence-calibration;tactic: perspective-rotation。

nodes.name: society-of-mind
nodes.description:
society-of-mind [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Du et al. 心智社会协作辩论。各 agent 独立评估后迭代共享修正直至收敛/分歧。编排 perspective-critic×N + divergence-detection;tactic: perspective-rotation。

nodes.name: courtroom-structured
nodes.description:
courtroom-structured [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:法庭对抗结构。控方陈述→辩方应答→证据交叉质证→法官逐项裁决,强调证据质量与程序严谨。tactics: evidence-tournament + dialectical-escalation。

nodes.name: adversarial-escalation
nodes.description:
adversarial-escalation [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:渐进压力升级。从表层挑战升级到根本假设攻击,基于 defender 信心衰减(L1 surface→L2 structural→L3 foundational),只有存活才进下一级。tactic: dialectical-escalation。

nodes.name: stress-test-assumption-challenge
nodes.description:
stress-test-assumption-challenge [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:军事级假设测试(Key Assumptions Check + Devil's Advocacy + Team A/B)。编排 key-assumptions-check→devils-advocacy→probe-execution→assumption-cascade-tracer;tactics: assumption-cascade + structured-attack-campaign。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 assumption-challenge → stress-test-assumption-challenge(裸名 assumption-challenge 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: alternative-analysis
nodes.description:
alternative-analysis [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:CIA SAT 替代分析(What-If/Alternative Futures/Four Ways of Seeing)。生成 2-4 竞争性解释挑战主导叙事。编排 alternative-futures→attack-vector-generation→probe-execution;tactics: structured-attack-campaign + adversarial-roleplay。

nodes.name: systematic-probing
nodes.description:
systematic-probing [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Anthropic 式系统化探测。穷举所有 threat surface,逐面生成攻击向量并执行。编排 threat-surface-mapping→attack-vector-generation→probe-execution→attack-resilience-scoring;tactics: structured-attack-campaign + assumption-cascade。

nodes.name: adversarial-persona
nodes.description:
adversarial-persona [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:敌对人格角色扮演攻击(hostile reviewer/competing lab/funding skeptic/domain outsider)。编排 persona-construction→attack-vector-generation→probe-execution→finding-aggregation;tactics: adversarial-roleplay + structured-attack-campaign。

nodes.name: groupthink-mitigation
nodes.description:
groupthink-mitigation [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:第十人法则+解放结构。制度化异见防止过早共识。编排 persona-construction 建强制异见者→devils-advocacy→probe-execution→key-assumptions-check;tactics: adversarial-roleplay + assumption-cascade。

nodes.name: prospective-hindsight
nodes.description:
prospective-hindsight [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Klein pre-mortem。假设 artifact 已失败,回溯可能原因生成快速失败场景目录。编排 premortem-facilitation→failure-mode-extraction→severity-scoring;tactics: premortem-to-fmea-pipeline + failure-chain-tracing。

nodes.name: design-fmea
nodes.description:
design-fmea [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:研究设计级 FMEA(AIAG-VDA 2019)。function-analysis→failure-mode-extraction→failure-chain-construction→S/O/D 并行评分→action-priority-matrix→mitigation-design-sop;tactics: failure-chain-tracing + mitigation-validation。

nodes.name: process-fmea
nodes.description:
process-fmea [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:研究执行过程 FMEA。分析研究过程本身在执行中如何失败(区别于设计级)。编排同 design-fmea 但 function-analysis 走 process 模式;tactics: failure-chain-tracing + mitigation-validation。

nodes.name: risk-prioritization
nodes.description:
risk-prioritization [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Action Priority 矩阵。用 severity 加权 S/O/D 把失败模式分 H/M/L。编排 action-priority-matrix→把 H 项喂给 mitigation-design;tactic: premortem-to-fmea-pipeline。

nodes.name: mitigation-design
nodes.description:
mitigation-design [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:对策设计(prevention/detection/response 三层)。为 H 优先失败模式设计对策并经 re-scoring 验证。编排 mitigation-design-sop→re-scoring→action-priority-matrix 迭代;tactic: mitigation-validation。

nodes.name: structural-counterfactual
nodes.description:
structural-counterfactual [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Pearl 三步反事实(Abduction-Action-Prediction)。causal-claim-extraction→factor-enumeration→single-factor-removal(干预)→counterfactual-scenario-construction(预测)→necessity/sufficiency 评分;tactics: systematic-factor-ablation + causal-necessity-testing。

nodes.name: necessity-sufficiency
nodes.description:
necessity-sufficiency [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:必要性/充分性概率 PNS-PS。把每个因子分类为必要/充分/两者/皆非。编排 causal-claim-extraction→factor-enumeration→necessity-evaluation+sufficiency-evaluation→load-bearing-identification;tactics: causal-necessity-testing + systematic-factor-ablation。

nodes.name: thought-experiment
nodes.description:
thought-experiment [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Williamson 式精确思想实验。构造精确反事实场景隔离单一变量,检验结论是否依赖偶然特征。tactics: minimal-change-search + causal-necessity-testing。

nodes.name: factor-removal
nodes.description:
factor-removal [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:系统化因子移除(ablation)。逐个移除因子观察结论稳定性,识别承重因子。编排 factor-enumeration→single-factor-removal→counterfactual-scenario-construction→fragility-measurement→load-bearing-identification;tactics: systematic-factor-ablation + minimal-change-search。

nodes.name: closest-worlds
nodes.description:
closest-worlds [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Lewis 可能世界。找翻转结论的最小改动,测量到最近反例世界的距离。编排 causal-claim-extraction→factor-enumeration→flip-point-detection→counterfactual-scenario-construction→fragility-measurement;tactics: minimal-change-search + systematic-factor-ablation。

nodes.name: assumption-negation
nodes.description:
assumption-negation [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:经典归谬(reductio ad absurdum)。否定核心断言→推导逻辑后果→寻找矛盾/荒谬。编排 claim-negation→deductive-chain→contradiction-detection→claim-refinement;tactics: contradiction-derivation + counterexample-heuristics。

nodes.name: lakatos-heuristics
nodes.description:
lakatos-heuristics [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Lakatos 证明与反驳。生成反例→monster-barring→存活反例并入引理精炼断言。编排 counterexample-generation→monster-barring-attempt→claim-refinement;tactics: counterexample-heuristics + contradiction-derivation。

nodes.name: boundary-enumeration
nodes.description:
boundary-enumeration [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:系统化边界值分析 BVA。识别参数边界,在极限及越界处测试断言有效性,记录 breakpoint。编排 parameter-space-mapping→extreme-value-generation→breakpoint-detection→validity-envelope-construction;tactic: boundary-probing。

nodes.name: critical-case-design
nodes.description:
critical-case-design [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:Flyvbjerg 关键案例法。设计 most-likely / least-likely 案例最大化推断力。编排 parameter-space-mapping→extreme-value-generation→breakpoint-detection→contradiction-detection;tactics: boundary-probing + counterexample-heuristics。

nodes.name: stress-test-validity-envelope-mapping
nodes.description:
stress-test-validity-envelope-mapping [strategy] · stress-test
Strategy:有效性包络综合。跨所有维度映射断言有效性边界并综合成有界区域,识别最弱维度。编排 parameter-space-mapping→extreme-value-generation→breakpoint-detection→validity-envelope-construction;tactics: boundary-probing + contradiction-derivation。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 validity-envelope-mapping → stress-test-validity-envelope-mapping(裸名 validity-envelope-mapping 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: stress-test-dialectical-escalation
nodes.description:
stress-test-dialectical-escalation [tactic] · stress-test
Tactic:辩证升级。基于信心阈值逐轮提升攻击复杂度。编排 debate-critic→debate-defender→debate-judge→confidence-calibration(>0.7 升级/0.3-0.7 同级换角度/<0.3 崩溃)。被 critic-defender-judge + adversarial-escalation 复用。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 dialectical-escalation → stress-test-dialectical-escalation(裸名 dialectical-escalation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: stress-test-perspective-rotation
nodes.description:
stress-test-perspective-rotation [tactic] · stress-test
Tactic:视角轮换。序贯多视角评估 + 分歧聚合 + 审议。编排 debate-architect 分配视角→perspective-critic×N→divergence-detection→confidence-calibration。被 society-of-mind + multi-perspective-panel 复用。
nodes.update: skill rename: 重命名磁盘文件夹 perspective-rotation → stress-test-perspective-rotation(裸名 perspective-rotation 跨 package 撞车,本 package 版独立成名)。

nodes.name: evidence-tournament
nodes.description:
evidence-tournament [tactic] · stress-test
Tactic:证据锦标赛。证据收集→呈堂→交叉质证→质量评分。编排 evidence-scout×2(正反)→debate-critic/defender→cross-examination→debate-judge。被 courtroom-structured + critic-defender-judge 复用。

nodes.name: structured-attack-campaign
nodes.description:
structured-attack-campaign [tactic] · stress-test
Tactic:完整攻击生命周期。threat-surface-mapping→attack-vector-generation→probe-execution→finding-aggregation→attack-resilience-scoring。被 systematic-probing/assumption-challenge/adversarial-persona/alternative-analysis 复用。

nodes.name: assumption-cascade
nodes.description:
